    Manage Developments & Phases
    📋 Audit Log — Who Changed What, When
    Loading…
    Copy Task Structure

    Copy all tasks from another villa into . Existing tasks in the target will be replaced.

    Add Task
    -
    Format: task ID or ID:type, e.g. T0001:FS  ·  FS=Finish→Start  SS=Start→Start  FF=Finish→Finish  SF=Start→Finish
    What would you like to add?
    Creates a new task group (e.g. Foundation, Structure, Finishing).
    Adds a subtask under an existing task group.
    ✓
    Task added
    Add subtasks to set dates and track progress.
    Add Resource
    Edit Project Budget
    Create New Baseline
    A descriptive name to identify this version of the schedule
    Tasks with no dates will be excluded from the baseline
    ⚠️ After creation, submit a Freeze Request to lock the baseline. Unfrozen baselines can still be overwritten.
    Submit Freeze Request
    ℹ️ Freezing a baseline locks it permanently. No further edits to dates will update it. This requires Administrator approval.
    Request Baseline Modification
    ⚠️ Modifying a frozen baseline requires Administrator approval. A new version will be created, preserving the original.
    Review Approval Request
    Baseline Details
    Edit Dependencies
    Task: -
    Dependency types:  FS = Finish-to-Start  ·  SS = Start-to-Start  ·  FF = Finish-to-Finish  ·  SF = Start-to-Finish
    Lag = days gap (positive = delay, negative = overlap)
    TASK DETAILS
    -
    Schedule
    Start Date
    Finish Date
    Duration
    days
    % Complete
    Float-
    Critical-
    Dependencies
    No predecessors
    Info
    Type-
    Resources
    Notes
    `); win.document.close(); } // ── Gantt drag-to-reschedule ─────────────────────────────────────────────── // Planners (edit/manage permission) can drag a task bar left/right to shift // its start and end dates while preserving duration. function ganttBarDragStart(e, el){ if(!CAN.edit){e.preventDefault();return;} const tid=el.dataset.tid; const barX=parseInt(el.dataset.bx)||0; const rect=el.getBoundingClientRect(); const offsetWithinBar=Math.max(0,e.clientX-rect.left); S.ganttDrag={tid,barX,offsetWithinBar,cw:parseInt(el.dataset.cw)||18,gs:el.dataset.gs}; e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed='move'; e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain',tid); } function ganttBarDrop(e){ e.preventDefault(); if(!S.ganttDrag||!CAN.edit){S.ganttDrag=null;return;} const{tid,offsetWithinBar,cw,gs}=S.ganttDrag; S.ganttDrag=null; const container=e.currentTarget; const rect=container.getBoundingClientRect(); // e.clientX - rect.left gives position within the bars container (rect accounts for scroll) const dropX=e.clientX-rect.left; const barStartX=dropX-offsetWithinBar; const dayOffset=Math.round(barStartX/cw); // Compute new dates const gsDate=new Date(gs+'T00:00:00'); const newStart=new Date(gsDate); newStart.setDate(newStart.getDate()+dayOffset); const newStartStr=newStart.toISOString().split('T')[0]; // Get task and compute duration const ts=Store.getTasksByProject(S.proj.id); const task=ts.find(t=>t.id===tid); if(!task)return; const oldStart=task.startDate?new Date(task.startDate+'T00:00:00'):newStart; const oldEnd=task.endDate?new Date(task.endDate+'T00:00:00'):new Date(oldStart);oldEnd.setDate(oldEnd.getDate()+1); const duration=Math.max(0,Math.round((oldEnd-oldStart)/86400000)); const newEnd=new Date(newStart); newEnd.setDate(newEnd.getDate()+duration); const newEndStr=newEnd.toISOString().split('T')[0]; // Don't save if nothing changed if(newStartStr===task.startDate&&newEndStr===task.endDate)return; const oldStartStr=task.startDate||'';const oldEndStr=task.endDate||''; task.startDate=newStartStr;task.endDate=newEndStr; Store.saveProjectTasks(S.proj.id,ts);Store.flush(); renderGantt();renderDetStats();syncProjStatus(S.proj.id); _logAudit('reschedule','task',tid,task.name); toast(`${task.name}: ${oldStartStr}→${newStartStr}`,'success',5000,{label:'Undo',fn:()=>{ const ts2=Store.getTasksByProject(S.proj.id); const t2=ts2.find(t=>t.id===tid); if(!t2)return; t2.startDate=oldStartStr;t2.endDate=oldEndStr; Store.saveProjectTasks(S.proj.id,ts2);Store.flush(); renderGantt();renderDetStats(); toast('Rescheduling undone','success'); }}); } // ── Auto-wire sequential dependencies within each subphase (non-destructive) // DEPRECATED: No longer called at render time. Left in place // as a utility for one-time import wiring only. Do not call from render paths. // Groups tasks by subphase, sorts chronologically, then chains them FS. // Only wires tasks that genuinely have empty predecessors - never overwrites. function _autoWireDeps(tasks){ if(!tasks||!tasks.length)return tasks; // Deep-clone only the fields we'll mutate so originals stay clean const copy=tasks.map(t=>({...t,predecessors:[...(t.predecessors||[])]})); const byId=new Map(copy.map(t=>[t.id,t])); // Group by subphase (fall back to phase if no subphase) const groups={}; copy.forEach(t=>{ const key=(t.subphaseId||t.phaseId||'__root__'); if(!groups[key])groups[key]=[]; groups[key].push(t); }); Object.values(groups).forEach(grp=>{ // Sort by start date, then end date as tiebreak grp.sort((a,b)=>(a.startDate||'').localeCompare(b.startDate||'') ||(a.endDate||'').localeCompare(b.endDate||'')); for(let i=1;i
    No resources
    Add team members to track allocation
    `;return;} if(view==='table'){ el.style.display='block';el.style.padding='14px'; el.innerHTML=`${arr.map(r=>{const mts=ts.filter(t=>t.assignee===r.name);const c=mts.reduce((a,t)=>a+(t.cost||0),0);return``;}).join('')}
    NameRoleEmailRate/DayAvail%TasksEst. CostActions
    ${ini(r.name)}${r.name}${r.role||'-'}${r.email||'-'}${fmtINR(r.rate)}${r.avail||100}%${mts.length}${fmtINR(c)}
    `; return; } el.style.display='';el.style.padding=''; el.innerHTML=arr.map(r=>{ const mts=ts.filter(t=>t.assignee===r.name); const done=mts.filter(t=>t.status==='completed').length; return `
    ${ini(r.name)}
    ${r.name}
    ${r.role||'-'}
    ${mts.length}
    Tasks
    ${done}
    Done
    `; }).join(''); } function openAddRes(){$('rmTitle').textContent='Add Resource';$('rmEId').value='';['rm-name','rm-role','rm-email','rm-phone'].forEach(id=>$(id).value='');$('rm-rate').value=0;$('rm-avail').value=100;$('rm-type').value='work';openMod('resMod');} function openEditRes(id){const r=Store.getResources()[id];if(!r)return;$('rmTitle').textContent='Edit Resource';$('rmEId').value=id;$('rm-name').value=r.name;$('rm-role').value=r.role||'';$('rm-email').value=r.email||'';$('rm-phone').value=r.phone||'';$('rm-rate').value=r.rate||0;$('rm-avail').value=r.avail||100;$('rm-type').value=r.type||'work';openMod('resMod');} function saveRes(){const name=$('rm-name').value.trim();if(!name)return renderStats();toast('Name required','error');const res=Store.getResources();const eid=$('rmEId').value;const id=eid||'R'+String(Date.now()).slice(-5);res[id]={id,name,role:$('rm-role').value,email:$('rm-email').value,phone:$('rm-phone').value,rate:Number($('rm-rate').value)||0,avail:Number($('rm-avail').value)||100,type:$('rm-type').value,color:aClr(name)};Store.saveResources(res);closeMod('resMod');renderRes();toast('Resource saved','success');} function delRes(id){if(!confirm('Delete resource?'))return;const r=Store.getResources();delete r[id];Store.saveResources(r);renderRes();toast('Resource deleted');} // ============================================================ // COSTS & BUDGET // ============================================================ function renderCosts(){ if(!S.proj)return;const p=S.proj;const ts=Store.getTasksByProject(p.id); const tot=ts.reduce((a,t)=>a+(t.cost||0),0); const done=ts.filter(t=>t.status==='completed').reduce((a,t)=>a+(t.cost||0),0); // Only show cost summary when actual cost data has been assigned if(!tot){ $('budSum').innerHTML=''; $('budTbl').innerHTML='
    No cost data yet
    Assign costs to tasks via the task edit modal
    to enable budget tracking for this villa.
    '; return; } const rem=(p.budget||0)-tot;const pct=p.budget?Math.round(tot/p.budget*100):0; $('budSum').innerHTML=`
    Total Budget
    ${fmtINR(p.budget)}
    Approved
    Planned Cost
    ${fmtINR(tot)}
    ${pct}% of budget
    Actual (Done)
    ${fmtINR(done)}
    Completed work
    Remaining
    ${fmtINR(rem)}
    ${rem<0?'Over budget':'Under budget'}
    `; const phD={};ts.forEach(t=>{if(!phD[t.phaseId])phD[t.phaseId]={name:t.phaseName,pl:0,ac:0,n:0};phD[t.phaseId].pl+=t.cost||0;if(t.status==='completed')phD[t.phaseId].ac+=t.cost||0;phD[t.phaseId].n++;}); $('budTbl').innerHTML=`PhaseTasksPlannedActualVariance% of Total${Object.values(phD).map(ph=>{const v=ph.pl-ph.ac;const pp=tot?Math.round(ph.pl/tot*100):0;return`${ph.name}${ph.n}${fmtINR(ph.pl)}${fmtINR(ph.ac)}${v>=0?'+':''}${fmtINR(v)}
    ${pp}%
    `;}).join('')}TOTAL${ts.length}${fmtINR(tot)}${fmtINR(done)}${fmtINR(rem)}100%`; } function openBudget(){if(!S.proj)return;$('bm-total').value=S.proj.budget||0;$('bm-cont').value=10;openMod('budMod');} function saveBudget(){const ps=Store.getProjects();ps[S.proj.id].budget=Number($('bm-total').value)||0;Store.saveProjects(ps);S.proj=ps[S.proj.id];closeMod('budMod');renderCosts();renderDetStats();renderDetHdr();toast('Budget updated','success');} // ============================================================ // BASELINE MANAGEMENT (v2 - full version control + approvals) // ============================================================ // ── Store: { projectId: { baselines:[], approvalRequests:[] } } let _blStore = {}; // Phase 1 fix: load persisted baselines from localStorage try{const _storedBL=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('_cky_bl')||'{}');Object.assign(_blStore,_storedBL);}catch(e){console.warn('[CKY] baseline load failed:',e.message);} // Apply any baselines fetched from server before _blStore was declared if(_C._pendingBaselines){Object.assign(_blStore,_C._pendingBaselines);delete _C._pendingBaselines;} function _blData(pid){ if(!_blStore[pid]) _blStore[pid]={baselines:[],approvalRequests:[]}; return _blStore[pid]; } // Phase 1 fix: _blSave now persists to localStorage immediately function _blSave(pid,data){ const all={...Store.getBaselinesMap(),[pid]:data}; Store.saveBaselinesMap(all); } // ── Unique ID helper function _blId(prefix){ return prefix+'-'+Date.now().toString(36)+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,6); } // ── Version label generator (BL.0, BL.1, BL.2 …) function _blVersion(pid){ const d=_blData(pid); return 'BL.'+d.baselines.length; } // ── Capture task snapshot from current schedule function _blCaptureTasks(pid,source){ const ts=Store.getTasksByProject(pid); return ts .filter(t=>source==='projected'?t.startDate&&t.endDate:t.startDate&&t.endDate) .map(t=>({ taskId:t.id, name:t.name, phaseName:t.phaseName||'', phaseId:t.phaseId||'', subphaseName:t.subphaseName||'', blStart:t.startDate, blEnd:t.endDate, duration:t.duration||(dBetween(t.startDate,t.endDate)||1) })); } function _projectedEndFromBaselineTasks(tasks){ const ends=(tasks||[]).map(t=>t.blEnd||t.endDate||t.end).filter(Boolean).sort(); return ends.length?ends[ends.length-1]:''; } function _computeDelayDays(beforeISO,afterISO){ if(!beforeISO||!afterISO)return 0; const d=dBetween(beforeISO,afterISO); return Math.max(0,d||0); } function _applyBaselineTasksToTaskSheet(pid,blTasks){ const current=Store.getTasksByProject(pid); const proj=Store.getProjects()[pid]||{}; const projPhase=(proj.phase||'').trim(); const map=new Map(current.map(t=>[t.id,t])); const out=[...current]; (blTasks||[]).forEach(bt=>{ const tid=bt.taskId; if(!tid)return; const ex=map.get(tid); if(ex){ const nx={...ex,startDate:bt.blStart||ex.startDate,endDate:bt.blEnd||ex.endDate}; recomputeDuration(nx); map.set(tid,nx); }else{ const btPhase=(bt.phaseName||'').trim()||(bt.phaseId||'').trim()||projPhase||'Unassigned Phase'; const btPhaseId=(bt.phaseId||'').trim()||btPhase.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g,'_')||'unassigned-phase'; map.set(tid,{ id:tid,projectId:pid,name:bt.name||'Untitled Task',phaseId:btPhaseId,phaseName:btPhase, subphaseId:'',subphaseName:bt.subphaseName||'',status:'not-started',priority:'medium',assignee:'Site Team',progress:0, startDate:bt.blStart||'',endDate:bt.blEnd||'',duration:bt.duration||1,cost:0,milestone:0,constraint:'asap',predecessors:[],notes:[] }); } }); const merged=out.map(t=>map.get(t.id)||t); map.forEach((v,k)=>{if(!current.find(t=>t.id===k))merged.push(v);}); Store.saveProjectTasks(pid,merged); } // ── Current user helpers function _blCurrentUser(){ return _currentUser||{name:'Unknown',role:'Viewer'}; } function _blIsAdmin(){ const r=_blCurrentUser().role; return r==='Administrator'; } function _blCanCreate(){ const r=_blCurrentUser().role; return ['Administrator','Project Manager','Senior Engineer'].includes(r); } // ── Open "Create Baseline" modal function openCreateBaseline(){ if(!S.proj){toast('Open a project first','warning');return;} if(!_blCanCreate()){toast('Only Project Managers or Administrators can create baselines','warning');return;} $('blc-name').value=''; $('blc-desc').value=''; $('blc-source').value='current'; openMod('blCreateMod'); } // ── Do Create Baseline function doCreateBaseline(){ const name=($('blc-name').value||'').trim(); if(!name){toast('Please enter a baseline name','warning');return;} const pid=S.proj.id; const d=_blData(pid); const user=_blCurrentUser(); const source=$('blc-source').value; const tasks=_blCaptureTasks(pid,source); if(!tasks.length){toast('No tasks with dates found in this project','warning');return;} const bl={ id:_blId('bl'), name, version:_blVersion(pid), description:($('blc-desc').value||'').trim(), createdBy:user.name, createdAt:new Date().toISOString(), frozenAt:null, frozenBy:null, status:'draft', // draft → frozen (after approval) isActive:d.baselines.length===0, // first BL is auto-active tasks }; d.baselines.push(bl); _blSave(pid,d); closeMod('blCreateMod'); toast(`Baseline "${bl.version} - ${name}" created (${tasks.length} tasks)`,'success'); renderBL(); } // ── Open Freeze Request modal function openFreezeRequest(blId){ const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid)return; const d=_blData(pid); const bl=d.baselines.find(b=>b.id===blId); if(!bl){return;} if(bl.status==='frozen'){toast('Already frozen','warning');return;} const hasPending=d.approvalRequests.some(r=>r.baselineId===blId&&r.type==='freeze'&&r.status==='pending'); if(hasPending){toast('A freeze request is already pending approval','warning');return;} $('blFreezeTitle').textContent=`Submit Freeze Request - ${bl.version}`; $('blFreeze-reason').value=''; $('blFreeze-blId').value=blId; openMod('blFreezeMod'); } // ── Do Submit Freeze Request function doSubmitFreezeRequest(){ const reason=($('blFreeze-reason').value||'').trim(); if(!reason){toast('Please provide a reason','warning');return;} const blId=$('blFreeze-blId').value; const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid)return; const d=_blData(pid); const bl=d.baselines.find(b=>b.id===blId); if(!bl)return; const user=_blCurrentUser(); const req={ id:_blId('req'), projectId:pid, baselineId:blId, baselineName:bl.name, baselineVersion:bl.version, type:'freeze', requestedBy:user.name, requestedAt:new Date().toISOString(), reason, status:'pending', reviewedBy:null, reviewedAt:null, comment:null }; d.approvalRequests.push(req); _blSave(pid,d); closeMod('blFreezeMod'); toast('Freeze request submitted - awaiting Administrator approval','success'); renderBL(); refreshApprovalsBadge(); } // ── Open Modify Request modal function openModifyRequest(blId){ const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid)return; const d=_blData(pid); const bl=d.baselines.find(b=>b.id===blId); if(!bl)return; if(bl.status!=='frozen'){toast('Only frozen baselines require a modification request','warning');return;} $('blMod-name').value=''; $('blMod-reason').value=''; $('blMod-blId').value=blId; openMod('blModifyMod'); } // ── Do Submit Modify Request function doSubmitModifyRequest(){ const newName=($('blMod-name').value||'').trim(); const reason=($('blMod-reason').value||'').trim(); if(!newName||!reason){toast('Please fill in name and reason','warning');return;} const blId=$('blMod-blId').value; const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid)return; const d=_blData(pid); const bl=d.baselines.find(b=>b.id===blId); if(!bl)return; const user=_blCurrentUser(); const req={ id:_blId('req'), projectId:pid, baselineId:blId, baselineName:bl.name, baselineVersion:bl.version, type:'modify', newBaselineName:newName, requestedBy:user.name, requestedAt:new Date().toISOString(), reason, status:'pending', reviewedBy:null, reviewedAt:null, comment:null }; const projs=Store.getProjects(); const before=(projs[pid]&&projs[pid].projectedEnd)||bl.tasks.map(t=>t.blEnd).filter(Boolean).sort().slice(-1)[0]||''; const currentTasks=_blCaptureTasks(pid,'current'); const after=_projectedEndFromBaselineTasks(currentTasks); req.projectedEndBefore=before||''; req.projectedEndAfter=after||''; req.delayDays=_computeDelayDays(before,after); d.approvalRequests.push(req); _blSave(pid,d); closeMod('blModifyMod'); toast('Modification request submitted - awaiting Administrator approval','success'); renderBL(); refreshApprovalsBadge(); } // ── Open Review modal (Admin) function openReviewRequest(reqId){ if(!_blIsAdmin()){toast('Only Administrators can review requests','warning');return;} const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid)return; const d=_blData(pid); const req=d.approvalRequests.find(r=>r.id===reqId); if(!req)return; const typeLabel=req.type==='freeze'?'Freeze Request':'Modification Request'; $('blReviewTitle').textContent=`Review ${typeLabel}`; $('blReview-comment').value=''; $('blReview-reqId').value=reqId; $('blReviewDetail').innerHTML=`
    ${req.baselineVersion}
    Baseline
    ${req.type==='freeze'?'🔒 Freeze':'✏️ Modify'}
    Request Type
    Requested By
    ${req.requestedBy} · ${new Date(req.requestedAt).toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'2-digit',year:'numeric'})}
    ${req.type==='modify'?`
    New Baseline Name
    ${req.newBaselineName}
    `:''} ${req.type==='modify'?`
    Projected End Impact
    ${req.projectedEndBefore||'-'} → ${req.projectedEndAfter||'-'} · ${(req.delayDays||0)>0?('+'+req.delayDays+' days delay'):'No delay'}
    `:''}
    Reason
    ${req.reason}
    `; openMod('blReviewMod'); } // ── Do Review (approve / reject) function doReviewRequest(decision){ const reqId=$('blReview-reqId').value; const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid)return; const d=_blData(pid); const req=d.approvalRequests.find(r=>r.id===reqId); if(!req)return; const user=_blCurrentUser(); req.status=decision; req.reviewedBy=user.name; req.reviewedAt=new Date().toISOString(); req.comment=($('blReview-comment').value||'').trim(); if(decision==='approved'){ if(req.type==='freeze'){ // Freeze the baseline const bl=d.baselines.find(b=>b.id===req.baselineId); if(bl){ bl.status='frozen'; bl.frozenAt=new Date().toISOString(); bl.frozenBy=user.name; } } else if(req.type==='modify'){ // Create a new draft baseline from the current schedule const newTasks=_blCaptureTasks(pid,'current'); const newBl={ id:_blId('bl'), name:req.newBaselineName, version:_blVersion(pid), description:'Created via approved modification request #'+req.id.slice(-6)+' - '+req.reason, createdBy:user.name, createdAt:new Date().toISOString(), frozenAt:null, frozenBy:null, status:'draft', isActive:false, tasks:newTasks, parentBaselineId:req.baselineId }; d.baselines.push(newBl); _applyBaselineTasksToTaskSheet(pid,newBl.tasks); syncProjStatus(pid); } } _blSave(pid,d); closeMod('blReviewMod'); const label=decision==='approved'?'✓ Approved':'✕ Rejected'; toast(`Request ${label} successfully`,'success'); renderBL(); refreshApprovalsBadge(); } // ============================================================ // GLOBAL APPROVALS PANEL // ============================================================ /** * Collect ALL pending (and recent) approval requests across every project. * Returns { pending: [...], recent: [...] } */ function _apvGetAll(){ const projs = Store.getProjects(); const pending = [], recent = []; Object.values(projs).forEach(proj=>{ const d = _blStore[proj.id]; if(!d || !d.approvalRequests) return; d.approvalRequests.forEach(req=>{ const entry = {...req, _projId: proj.id, _projName: proj.name, _projCode: proj.code||proj.id}; if(req.status === 'pending') pending.push(entry); else recent.push(entry); }); }); // Sort: oldest pending first; most recent history first pending.sort((a,b)=>new Date(a.requestedAt)-new Date(b.requestedAt)); recent.sort((a,b)=>new Date(b.reviewedAt||b.requestedAt)-new Date(a.reviewedAt||a.requestedAt)); return { pending, recent: recent.slice(0,20) }; } /** * Update the badge count on the header Approvals button. * Called after every action that may change request counts. */ function refreshApprovalsBadge(){ const {pending} = _apvGetAll(); const badge = $('approvalsBadge'); if(!badge) return; if(pending.length > 0){ badge.textContent = pending.length > 99 ? '99+' : String(pending.length); badge.style.display = ''; } else { badge.style.display = 'none'; } } function toggleApprovalsPanel(){ const overlay = $('apvOverlay'); const panel = $('apvPanel'); const isOpen = panel.classList.contains('open'); if(isOpen){ closeApprovalsPanel(); } else { overlay.classList.add('open'); panel.classList.add('open'); renderApprovalsPanel(); } } function closeApprovalsPanel(){ $('apvOverlay').classList.remove('open'); $('apvPanel').classList.remove('open'); } function _apvClickOutside(ev){ if(ev.target === $('apvOverlay')) closeApprovalsPanel(); } function renderApprovalsPanel(){ const isAdmin = _blIsAdmin(); const {pending, recent} = _apvGetAll(); const sub = $('apvSubtitle'); const body = $('apvBody'); if(sub) sub.textContent = pending.length ? `${pending.length} pending request${pending.length!==1?'s':''}` : 'No pending requests'; const fmtD = ds => { if(!ds) return '-'; try{ return new Date(ds.slice(0,10)+'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'2-digit',year:'numeric'}); } catch(e){ return ds.slice(0,10); } }; let html = ''; // ── PENDING SECTION ────────────────────────────────────── if(pending.length === 0){ html += `
    ✅
    All clear
    No pending approval requests across any project.
    `; } else { html += `
    Pending - Action Required (${pending.length})
    `; if(!isAdmin){ html += `
    Only Administrators can approve or reject requests. Contact your admin to review these.
    `; } pending.forEach(req=>{ const typeLabel = req.type==='freeze' ? '🔒 Freeze Request' : '✏️ Modification Request'; const cardClass = req.type==='freeze' ? 'apv-card apv-freeze' : 'apv-card apv-modify'; const commentId = 'apv-comment-'+req.id; let actionsHtml = ''; if(isAdmin){ actionsHtml = `
    `; } else { actionsHtml = `
    `; } html += `
    ${req._projCode} · ${req._projName}
    ${typeLabel} - ${req.baselineVersion} "${req.baselineName}"
    ⏳ Pending
    Requested by ${req.requestedBy} · ${fmtD(req.requestedAt)}${req.type==='modify'&&req.newBaselineName?` · New name: ${req.newBaselineName}`:''}
    ${req.reason}
    ${actionsHtml}
    `; }); html += '
    '; } // ── RECENT HISTORY SECTION ─────────────────────────────── if(recent.length){ html += `
    Recent History
    `; recent.slice(0,10).forEach(req=>{ const icon = req.status==='approved' ? '✅' : '✕'; const clr = req.status==='approved' ? 'var(--success)' : 'var(--danger)'; const typeLabel = req.type==='freeze' ? 'Freeze' : 'Modification'; html += `
    ${icon}
    ${typeLabel} - ${req.baselineVersion} "${req.baselineName}"
    ${req._projName} · ${req.status==='approved'?'Approved':'Rejected'} by ${req.reviewedBy||'-'} · ${fmtD(req.reviewedAt)}${req.comment?' · "'+req.comment+'"':''}
    `; }); html += '
    '; } if(body) body.innerHTML = html; } /** * Approve or reject a request directly from the global panel. */ function _apvDecide(projId, reqId, decision, commentElId){ if(!_blIsAdmin()){ toast('Only Administrators can approve or reject requests','warning'); return; } const d = _blData(projId); const req = d.approvalRequests.find(r=>r.id===reqId); if(!req){ toast('Request not found','error'); return; } const user = _blCurrentUser(); req.status = decision; req.reviewedBy = user.name; req.reviewedAt = new Date().toISOString(); req.comment = (document.getElementById(commentElId)||{}).value||''; if(decision === 'approved'){ if(req.type === 'freeze'){ const bl = d.baselines.find(b=>b.id===req.baselineId); if(bl){ bl.status='frozen'; bl.frozenAt=new Date().toISOString(); bl.frozenBy=user.name; } } else if(req.type === 'modify'){ const newTasks = _blCaptureTasks(projId,'current'); const newBl = { id:_blId('bl'), name:req.newBaselineName, version:_blVersion(projId), description:'Created via approved modification #'+req.id.slice(-6)+' - '+req.reason, createdBy:user.name, createdAt:new Date().toISOString(), frozenAt:null, frozenBy:null, status:'draft', isActive:false, tasks:newTasks, parentBaselineId:req.baselineId }; d.baselines.push(newBl); _applyBaselineTasksToTaskSheet(projId,newBl.tasks); syncProjStatus(projId); } } _blSave(projId, d); // If this project is currently open, refresh its BL tab if(S.proj && S.proj.id === projId) renderBL(); // Refresh panel and badge refreshApprovalsBadge(); renderApprovalsPanel(); toast(decision==='approved' ? '✓ Request approved' : '✕ Request rejected', decision==='approved'?'success':'warning'); } /** * Navigate to a project and open its Baseline tab. */ function _apvNavigate(projId){ const projs = Store.getProjects(); const proj = projs[projId]; if(!proj){ toast('Project not found','error'); return; } closeApprovalsPanel(); // Open the project S.proj = proj; showMain('det'); $('htab-nm').textContent = proj.name; // Switch to the Baseline tab setTimeout(function(){ const blTabBtn = document.querySelector('.vtab[onclick*="tbl"]'); if(blTabBtn){ swTab(blTabBtn,'tbl'); } else renderBL(); }, 100); } // ── Set a baseline as the active comparison reference function blmSetActive(blId){ const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid)return; const d=_blData(pid); d.baselines.forEach(b=>b.isActive=(b.id===blId)); _blSave(pid,d); toast('Active baseline updated','success'); renderBL(); } // ── Delete a draft baseline function blmDeleteBaseline(blId){ const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid)return; const d=_blData(pid); const bl=d.baselines.find(b=>b.id===blId); if(!bl)return; if(bl.status==='frozen'){toast('Cannot delete a frozen baseline','warning');return;} if(!confirm(`Delete draft baseline "${bl.version} - ${bl.name}"?`))return; d.baselines=d.baselines.filter(b=>b.id!==blId); d.approvalRequests=d.approvalRequests.filter(r=>r.baselineId!==blId); _blSave(pid,d); toast('Draft baseline deleted'); renderBL(); } // ── Load a draft baseline back into the Planner for editing function blmOpenInPlanner(blId){ const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid)return; const d=_blData(pid); const bl=d.baselines.find(b=>b.id===blId); if(!bl){toast('Baseline not found','error');return;} if(bl.status==='frozen'){toast('Cannot edit a frozen baseline in the Planner. Request a modification first.','warning');return;} const curPlan=_pData(pid); if(curPlan.length&&!confirm(`Loading "${bl.name}" will replace the current Planner data. Continue?`))return; _pSnapshot(pid); // Convert baseline tasks → planner rows // Group by phaseName for hierarchy const phaseMap=new Map(); bl.tasks.forEach(bt=>{ const ph=bt.phaseName||'General'; if(!phaseMap.has(ph))phaseMap.set(ph,[]); phaseMap.get(ph).push(bt); }); const newPlan=[]; phaseMap.forEach((bts,ph)=>{ // Phase summary row newPlan.push({ id:_pId(),type:'summary',name:ph,indent:0, duration:0,start:'',end:'',predecessors:[],progress:0, isSummary:true,collapsed:false }); bts.forEach(bt=>{ newPlan.push({ id:bt.taskId||_pId(), type:'task', name:bt.name, indent:1, duration:bt.duration||1, start:bt.blStart||'', end:bt.blEnd||'', predecessors:[], progress:0, resources:'', notes:'', isSummary:false, isCritical:false, float:null, collapsed:false, phase:bt.phaseId||ph }); }); }); _pSet(pid,newPlan); Scheduler.scheduleProject(pid); // Switch to planner tab swTabById('tplan'); toast(`Baseline "${bl.name}" loaded into Planner - ${bl.tasks.length} tasks ready to edit`, 'success'); } // ── Open compare section function blmShowCompare(){ const sec=$('blmCmpSection'); sec.style.display=''; populateCmpSelector(); renderBlmComparison(); sec.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'start'}); } // ── Populate the baseline selector in the compare panel function populateCmpSelector(){ const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid)return; const d=_blData(pid); const sel=$('blmCmpSel'); sel.innerHTML=d.baselines.map(b=>``).join(''); } // ── Populate phase filter function populateCmpPhaseFilter(tasks){ const phases=[...new Set(tasks.map(t=>t.phaseName).filter(Boolean))].sort(); const sel=$('blmCmpPhase'); const cur=sel.value; sel.innerHTML=''+phases.map(p=>``).join(''); if(cur)sel.value=cur; } // ── Day diff helper (reuse existing dBetween if available, else inline) function _blDayDiff(a,b){ if(!a||!b)return null; const da=new Date(a+'T00:00:00'),db=new Date(b+'T00:00:00'); return Math.round((db-da)/86400000); } // ── Render comparison table function renderBlmComparison(){ const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid)return; const d=_blData(pid); const selId=$('blmCmpSel').value; if(!selId||!d.baselines.length)return; const bl=d.baselines.find(b=>b.id===selId); if(!bl)return; const curTasks=Store.getTasksByProject(pid); const filter=$('blmCmpFilter').value; const phaseFilter=$('blmCmpPhase').value; // Build map from taskId → baseline task const blMap=new Map(bl.tasks.map(t=>[t.taskId,t])); populateCmpPhaseFilter(bl.tasks); let rows=[]; let ahead=0,behind=0,ontime=0,nodata=0; bl.tasks.forEach(bt=>{ const ct=curTasks.find(t=>t.id===bt.taskId); const sv=ct&&ct.startDate?_blDayDiff(bt.blStart,ct.startDate):null; const fv=ct&&ct.endDate?_blDayDiff(bt.blEnd,ct.endDate):null; const blDur=_blDayDiff(bt.blStart,bt.blEnd)||bt.duration||1; const curDur=ct&&ct.startDate&&ct.endDate?(_blDayDiff(ct.startDate,ct.endDate)||1):null; let variance='nodata'; if(fv!==null){ if(fv>0){variance='behind';behind++;}else if(fv<0){variance='ahead';ahead++;}else{variance='ontime';ontime++;} } else nodata++; rows.push({bt,ct,sv,fv,blDur,curDur,variance}); }); // Apply filters if(filter)rows=rows.filter(r=>r.variance===filter||( filter==='changed'&&(r.sv!==0||r.fv!==0))); if(phaseFilter)rows=rows.filter(r=>r.bt.phaseName===phaseFilter); // Stats const total=rows.length; $('blmCmpStats').innerHTML=`
    ${behind}
    Behind
    ${ahead}
    Ahead
    ${ontime}
    On Time
    ${nodata}
    No Data
    `; const fmtD=d=>d?new Date(d+'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'2-digit',year:'numeric'}):'-'; const varCell=(v,label)=>{ if(v===null)return `-`; const cls=v>0?'bl-var-behind':v<0?'bl-var-ahead':'bl-var-ontime'; const bar=v!==0?`
    `:''; return `
    ${bar}${v>0?'+':''}${v}d
    `; }; $('blmCmpBody').innerHTML=rows.map(({bt,ct,sv,fv,blDur,curDur})=>` ${bt.name} ${bt.phaseName} ${fmtD(bt.blStart)} ${fmtD(bt.blEnd)} ${blDur}d ${ct?fmtD(ct.startDate):'-'} ${ct?fmtD(ct.endDate):'-'} ${curDur!==null?curDur+'d':'-'} ${varCell(sv,'start')} ${varCell(fv,'finish')} ${ct?slt(ct.status):'Removed'} `).join(''); } // ── View full baseline task list in modal function blmViewDetail(blId){ const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid)return; const d=_blData(pid); const bl=d.baselines.find(b=>b.id===blId); if(!bl)return; const fmtD=d=>d?new Date(d+'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'2-digit',year:'numeric'}):'-'; $('blDetailTitle').textContent=`${bl.version} - ${bl.name}`; $('blDetailBody').innerHTML=`
    ${bl.tasks.length}
    Tasks
    ${fmtD(bl.createdAt.split('T')[0])}
    Created
    ${bl.frozenAt?fmtD(bl.frozenAt.split('T')[0]):'Not Frozen'}
    ${bl.status==='frozen'?'Frozen':'Status: Draft'}
    ${bl.description?`
    ${bl.description}
    `:''} ${bl.tasks.map(t=>``).join('')}
    TaskPhaseBL StartBL FinishDuration
    ${t.name} ${t.phaseName} ${fmtD(t.blStart)} ${fmtD(t.blEnd)} ${t.duration||'-'}d
    `; openMod('blDetailMod'); } // ── MAIN RENDER FUNCTION function renderBL(){ if(!S.proj)return; const pid=S.proj.id; const d=_blData(pid); const isAdmin=_blIsAdmin(); const canCreate=_blCanCreate(); const fmtD=dStr=>{ if(!dStr)return '-'; try{ return new Date(dStr.slice(0,10)+'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'2-digit',year:'numeric'}); } catch(e){ return dStr.slice(0,10); } }; // Show/hide top actions $('btnCreateBl').style.display=canCreate?'':'none'; $('btnBlCmp').style.display=d.baselines.length?'':'none'; // --- VERSION LIST --- const bls=d.baselines; $('blmVerCount').textContent=bls.length+' version'+(bls.length!==1?'s':''); if(!bls.length){ $('blmVerList').innerHTML=`
    🗂️
    No baselines yet
    Create your first baseline to freeze the planned schedule.
    Baselines track schedule performance over time.
    `; } else { $('blmVerList').innerHTML=`
    ${bls.map(bl=>{ const statusChip=bl.status==='frozen' ?`🔒 Frozen` :`Draft`; const activeChip=bl.isActive?`✓ Active`:''; const pendingFreeze=d.approvalRequests.some(r=>r.baselineId===bl.id&&r.type==='freeze'&&r.status==='pending'); const pendingModify=d.approvalRequests.some(r=>r.baselineId===bl.id&&r.type==='modify'&&r.status==='pending'); const pendingChip=pendingFreeze||pendingModify?`⏳ Pending`:''; let actions=''; if(bl.status==='draft'&&canCreate&&!pendingFreeze){ actions+=``; } if(bl.status==='frozen'&&canCreate&&!pendingModify){ actions+=``; } if(!bl.isActive){ actions+=``; } // ── Open in Planner - loads baseline tasks back into the planner for editing if(bl.status==='draft'){ actions+=``; } actions+=``; if(bl.status==='draft'&&isAdmin){ actions+=``; } const cardClass=`bl-ver-card${bl.isActive?' active-bl':''}${bl.status==='frozen'?' frozen-bl':''}`; return `
    ${bl.version}
    ${bl.name}
    ${bl.tasks.length} tasks · Created by ${bl.createdBy} · ${fmtD(bl.createdAt)}${bl.frozenAt?' · Frozen: '+fmtD(bl.frozenAt):''}
    ${statusChip}${activeChip}${pendingChip}
    ${actions}
    `; }).join('')}
    `; } // --- APPROVAL REQUESTS --- const reqs=d.approvalRequests.slice().reverse(); $('blmReqCount').textContent=reqs.length+' request'+(reqs.length!==1?'s':''); if(!reqs.length){ $('blmReqList').innerHTML=`
    ✅
    No approval requests
    Baseline change requests and freeze approvals will appear here.
    `; } else { $('blmReqList').innerHTML=`
    ${reqs.map(req=>{ const statusChip={ pending:`⏳ Pending`, approved:`✓ Approved`, rejected:`✕ Rejected` }[req.status]||''; const typeLabel=req.type==='freeze'?'🔒 Freeze Request':'✏️ Modification Request'; const actions=req.status==='pending'&&isAdmin?``:''; return `
    ${typeLabel} - ${req.baselineVersion} "${req.baselineName}"
    ${statusChip}
    Requested by ${req.requestedBy} · ${fmtD(req.requestedAt)}${req.type==='modify'&&req.newBaselineName?' · New Name: '+req.newBaselineName:''}${req.reviewedBy?' · Reviewed by '+req.reviewedBy+' ('+fmtD(req.reviewedAt)+')':''}
    ${req.reason}
    ${req.comment?`
    Reviewer note: ${req.comment}
    `:''} ${actions?`
    ${actions}
    `:''}
    `; }).join('')}
    `; } // Refresh comparison if visible if($('blmCmpSection').style.display!=='none'){ populateCmpSelector(); renderBlmComparison(); } } // ── Quick-compare shortcut from version card click function blmShowCompareFor(blId){ blmShowCompare(); setTimeout(()=>{ $('blmCmpSel').value=blId; renderBlmComparison(); },50); } // ── Called when switching to BL tab function onTabBL(){ renderBL(); } // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // PLANNING MODULE - MS Project-style scheduler // Replaces the need for MS Project for baseline creation // and schedule management. // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // ── Store: { projectId: PlanTask[] } let _PT={}; // ── Selected task ID in planner let _pSel=null; // ── Active inline-edit: { id, field } let _pEdit=null; // ── Undo stack (last 20 snapshots) let _pUndo={}; // ── Get / init plan tasks for a project function _pData(pid){ if(!_PT[pid])_PT[pid]=[]; return _PT[pid]; } function _pHas(pid){ return !!_PT[pid]; } function _pReplace(pid,tasks){ _PT[pid]=tasks||[]; return _PT[pid]; } function _persistPlannerStore(){ _safeStore('_cky_planner', _PT); } // Phase 1 fix: _pSet now auto-syncs to _realTasks and persists _PT to localStorage // This ensures Planner edits are visible in Task Sheet, Gantt, and Reports, // and survive page refresh without requiring a manual "export to task sheet" action function _pSet(pid,tasks){ _pReplace(pid,tasks); // Sync to main task store - strip planner-only computed fields, ensure both // date formats are populated so Task Sheet, Gantt, and Baselines all see dates. const prevMap=new Map((Store.getTasksByProject(pid)||[]).map(t=>[t.id,t])); const syncTasks=tasks.map(t=>{ const {_es,_ef,_ls,_lf,_float,isCritical,...rest}=t; // Map Planner date fields (start/end) → Task Sheet fields (startDate/endDate) // so _blCaptureTasks(), renderGantt(), and Scheduler.criticalTaskIds() all see consistent dates. if(!rest.startDate&&rest.start) rest.startDate=rest.start; if(!rest.endDate&&rest.end) rest.endDate=rest.end; normalizeProgressStatus(rest); stampActualDates(rest,prevMap.get(rest.id),_todayISO()); recomputeDuration(rest); return rest; }); if(_hasDependencyCycle(syncTasks)){toast('Invalid dependency: cycle detected','error');return;} Store.saveProjectTasks(pid,syncTasks); // Persist planner state separately so collapse/indent/ordering survive refresh _persistPlannerStore(); } // ── Push undo snapshot function _pSnapshot(pid){ const d=_pData(pid); if(!_pUndo[pid])_pUndo[pid]=[]; _pUndo[pid].push(JSON.stringify(d)); if(_pUndo[pid].length>20)_pUndo[pid].shift(); } // ── Unique IDs function _pId(){ return 'pt'+Date.now().toString(36)+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,5); } // ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── // DATE HELPERS (calendar days - consistent with existing tool) // ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── // All date maths done in UTC to avoid timezone off-by-one errors (IST=UTC+5:30) const _pD=s=>{if(!s)return null;const[y,m,d]=s.split('-').map(Number);return new Date(Date.UTC(y,m-1,d));}; const _pFmt=d=>{if(!d)return '';const y=d.getUTCFullYear(),m=d.getUTCMonth()+1,dd=d.getUTCDate();return `${y}-${String(m).padStart(2,'0')}-${String(dd).padStart(2,'0')}`;}; function _pAdd(dateStr,days){ if(!dateStr)return ''; const d=_pD(dateStr); d.setUTCDate(d.getUTCDate()+Math.round(days)); return _pFmt(d); } function _pDiff(a,b){ if(!a||!b)return null; return Math.round((_pD(b)-_pD(a))/86400000); } function _pMax(a,b){ if(!a)return b; if(!b)return a; return a>b?a:b; } function _pMin(a,b){ if(!a)return b; if(!b)return a; return a{ const lvl=t.indent||0; cnt[lvl]++; for(let i=lvl+1;i{ const nxt=tasks[i+1]; t.isSummary=!!(nxt&&(nxt.indent||0)>(t.indent||0))&&t.type!=='milestone'; }); } function _pRollup(tasks){ // Roll up summary task dates from children (bottom-up) for(let i=tasks.length-1;i>=0;i--){ const t=tasks[i]; if(!t.isSummary)continue; const lvl=t.indent||0; const children=[]; for(let j=i+1;jc.start).filter(Boolean).sort(); const ce=children.map(c=>c.end).filter(Boolean).sort(); if(cs.length)t.start=cs[0]; if(ce.length)t.end=ce[ce.length-1]; if(t.start&&t.end)t.duration=(_pDiff(t.start,t.end)||0)+1; } } // ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── // TOPOLOGICAL SORT (Kahn's algorithm on non-summary tasks) // Returns tasks in predecessor-before-successor order. // Summary tasks are excluded from the sort and re-inserted // after processing so rollup still works. // ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function _pTopoSort(tasks){ // Separate summaries - they have no pred/succ wiring at this level const work=tasks.filter(t=>!t.isSummary); const sum=tasks.filter(t=>t.isSummary); // Build adjacency (pred → succ) and in-degree count const inDeg=new Map(work.map(t=>[t.id,0])); const adj=new Map(work.map(t=>[t.id,[]])); // id → [succId, ...] work.forEach(t=>{ (t.predecessors||[]).forEach(p=>{ if(!inDeg.has(p.id))return; // predecessor might be a summary or unknown - skip adj.get(p.id).push(t.id); inDeg.set(t.id,(inDeg.get(t.id)||0)+1); }); }); // Queue all nodes with no predecessors const queue=work.filter(t=>(inDeg.get(t.id)||0)===0).map(t=>t.id); const sorted=[]; const idMap=new Map(work.map(t=>[t.id,t])); while(queue.length){ const id=queue.shift(); const t=idMap.get(id); if(t)sorted.push(t); (adj.get(id)||[]).forEach(succId=>{ const nd=(inDeg.get(succId)||1)-1; inDeg.set(succId,nd); if(nd===0)queue.push(succId); }); } // Any task not reached (cycle) goes at the end in original order const sortedSet=new Set(sorted.map(t=>t.id)); work.filter(t=>!sortedSet.has(t.id)).forEach(t=>sorted.push(t)); // Re-merge summaries back in their original positions // Walk original tasks array; whenever we hit a summary insert it; for work tasks use sorted order const sortedIter=[...sorted]; let si=0; return tasks.map(t=>t.isSummary?t:sortedIter[si++]); } // ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── // FORWARD PASS (Earliest Start / Finish from predecessors) // ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function _pForward(tasks){ const map=new Map(tasks.map(t=>[t.id,t])); // Sort into topological order so every predecessor is resolved before its successor const ordered=_pTopoSort(tasks); ordered.forEach(t=>{ if(t.isSummary)return; const dur=(t.duration||1); let es=t.start; // manual start as floor (t.predecessors||[]).forEach(pred=>{ const p=map.get(pred.id); if(!p||!p.end)return; const lag=pred.lag||0; const type=(pred.type||'FS').toUpperCase(); let candidate; if(type==='FS'){ candidate=_pAdd(p.end,lag+1); es=_pMax(es,candidate); }else if(type==='SS'){ candidate=_pAdd(p.start||p.es||p.start,lag); es=_pMax(es,candidate); }else if(type==='FF'){ // ef = max(current ef, pred.end + lag); es = ef - (dur-1) const cur_ef=_pAdd(es,dur-1); const new_ef=_pMax(cur_ef,_pAdd(p.end,lag)); es=_pAdd(new_ef,-(dur-1)); }else if(type==='SF'){ // ef = max(current ef, pred.start + lag); es = ef - (dur-1) const cur_ef=_pAdd(es,dur-1); const new_ef=_pMax(cur_ef,_pAdd(p.start||p.es,lag)); es=_pAdd(new_ef,-(dur-1)); } }); if(es){ t.es=es; t.start=es; t.ef=_pAdd(es,dur-1); t.end=t.ef; } }); _pRollup(tasks); } // ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── // BACKWARD PASS (Latest Start / Finish → Float → Critical) // ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function _pBackward(tasks){ const map=new Map(tasks.map(t=>[t.id,t])); // Project end = latest finish of any non-summary task const ends=tasks.filter(t=>!t.isSummary&&t.end).map(t=>t.end).sort(); if(!ends.length)return; const projEnd=ends[ends.length-1]; // Build successor index: taskId → [{succId,type,lag}] const succs=new Map(); tasks.forEach(t=>(t.predecessors||[]).forEach(p=>{ if(!succs.has(p.id))succs.set(p.id,[]); succs.get(p.id).push({succId:t.id,type:(p.type||'FS').toUpperCase(),lag:p.lag||0}); })); // Backward pass in reverse-topological order (so every successor is resolved before its predecessor) const _bOrdered=[..._pTopoSort(tasks)].reverse(); _bOrdered.forEach(t=>{ if(t.isSummary||!t.end)return; const dur=(t.duration||1); const sl=succs.get(t.id)||[]; if(!sl.length){ t.lf=projEnd; }else{ let lf=null; sl.forEach(s=>{ const succ=map.get(s.succId); if(!succ||succ.ls===undefined)return; let bound; if(s.type==='FS') bound=_pAdd(succ.ls,-(s.lag+1)); else if(s.type==='SS') bound=_pAdd(_pAdd(succ.ls,-s.lag),(dur-1)); else bound=_pAdd(succ.lf,-s.lag); lf=lf?_pMin(lf,bound):bound; }); t.lf=lf||projEnd; } t.ls=_pAdd(t.lf,-(dur-1)); const flt=_pDiff(t.es||t.start,t.ls); t.float=Math.max(0,flt||0); t.isCritical=(t.float<=0); }); // Roll up critical flag to summaries tasks.forEach((t,i)=>{ if(!t.isSummary)return; const lvl=t.indent||0; for(let j=i+1;j{ const lvl=t.indent||0; if(skipBelow>=0&&lvl>skipBelow)return; skipBelow=-1; vis.push(t); if(t.isSummary&&t.collapsed)skipBelow=lvl; }); return vis; } // ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── // PARSE PREDECESSORS STRING e.g. "1.2FS+2, 1.3SS, 2" // ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function _pParsePreds(str,tasks){ if(!str||str==='-')return[]; return str.split(',').map(s=>s.trim()).filter(Boolean).map(tok=>{ // tok examples: "1.2FS+2", "1.3SS", "2", "1.2" const m=tok.match(/^([\d.]+)(FS|SS|FF|SF)?([+-]\d+)?$/i); if(!m)return null; const wbs=m[1], type=(m[2]||'FS').toUpperCase(), lag=parseInt(m[3]||0)||0; const pred=tasks.find(t=>t.wbs===wbs); if(!pred)return null; return {id:pred.id,type,lag}; }).filter(Boolean); } // ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── // FORMAT PREDECESSORS → display string // ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function _pPredsStr(preds,tasks){ if(!preds||!preds.length)return'-'; return preds.map(p=>{ const pt=tasks.find(t=>t.id===p.id); const w=pt?pt.wbs:'?'; const ty=p.type&&p.type!=='FS'?p.type:''; const lg=p.lag?(p.lag>0?'+'+p.lag:String(p.lag)):''; return w+ty+lg; }).join(', '); } // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // RENDER - full planner // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function renderPlanner(){ if(!S.proj)return; const pid=S.proj.id; Scheduler.scheduleProject(pid); renderPlanGrid(); renderPlanGantt(); _pStatusBar(pid); } // ── Task grid function renderPlanGrid(){ if(!S.proj)return; const pid=S.proj.id; const vis=_pVisible(pid); const allTasks=_pData(pid); const ROW_H=32; if(!vis.length){ $('planBody').innerHTML=`
    📋
    No tasks yet
    Click + Task to add your first task, or
    ↓ Import Tasks to load from the Task Sheet.
    `; return; } $('planBody').innerHTML=vis.map(t=>{ const lvl=t.indent||0; const isSm=t.isSummary,isMil=t.type==='milestone',isCrit=t.isCritical; const isSel=_pSel===t.id; const indentPx=lvl*18; // Expand button for summary rows const expBtn=isSm?`${t.collapsed?'▶':'▼'}`:``; const critPip=isCrit&&!isSm?``:''; const namePrefix=isMil?'◇ ':(isSm?'▤ ':''); // Float display const fltNum=t.float; const flt=t.isSummary?'-':(fltNum===undefined||fltNum===null?'-': fltNum===0?`0`: fltNum<=3?`${fltNum}d`: `${fltNum}d`); // Progress const prog=t.isSummary||isMil?'-':`${t.progress||0}%`; const clsList=[isSm?'psum':'',isCrit?'pcrit':'',isMil?'pmile':'',isSel?'psel':''].filter(Boolean).join(' '); return ` ${t.wbs||''}
    ${expBtn}${critPip}${namePrefix}${t.name||'New Task'}
    ${isSm?'-':((t.duration||1)+'d')} ${_pFmtShow(t.start)} ${_pFmtShow(t.end)} ${_pPredsStr(t.predecessors,allTasks)||'-'} ${flt} ${prog} `; }).join(''); } // ── Gantt chart function renderPlanGantt(){ if(!S.proj)return; const pid=S.proj.id; const vis=_pVisible(pid); const allTasks=_pData(pid); if(!vis.length){$('planGHdr').innerHTML='';$('planGRows').innerHTML='';return;} const scale=$('planScale')?.value||'week'; const ROW_H=32; // Compute date range const allD=vis.flatMap(t=>[t.start,t.end]).filter(Boolean).sort(); if(!allD.length)return; const gS=_pAdd(allD[0],-7), gE=_pAdd(allD[allD.length-1],14); const colW=scale==='day'?28:scale==='week'?18:7; const totDays=Math.max(_pDiff(gS,gE)||1,1); const totW=totDays*colW; const toX=d=>Math.max(_pDiff(gS,d)||0,0)*colW; const toW=(s,e)=>Math.max((_pDiff(s,e)||0)*colW+colW,4); const today=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]; // Header ticks let hdrHtml=''; if(scale==='month'){ let cur=new Date(gS+'T00:00:00'); const end=new Date(gE+'T00:00:00'); while(cur<=end){ const x=toX(_pFmt(cur)); const dim=new Date(cur.getFullYear(),cur.getMonth()+1,0).getDate(); const w=dim*colW; const lbl=cur.toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{month:'2-digit',year:'numeric'}); hdrHtml+=`
    ${lbl}
    `; cur.setMonth(cur.getMonth()+1); cur.setDate(1); } }else if(scale==='week'){ let cur=new Date(gS+'T00:00:00'); const end=new Date(gE+'T00:00:00'); // Snap to Monday const dow=cur.getDay(); cur.setDate(cur.getDate()-(dow===0?6:dow-1)); while(cur<=end){ const x=toX(_pFmt(cur)); const lbl=cur.toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'2-digit'}); hdrHtml+=`
    ${lbl}
    `; cur.setDate(cur.getDate()+7); } }else{ let cur=new Date(gS+'T00:00:00'); const end=new Date(gE+'T00:00:00'); while(cur<=end){ const x=toX(_pFmt(cur)); const isWk=cur.getDay()===0||cur.getDay()===6; hdrHtml+=`
    ${cur.getDate()}
    `; cur.setDate(cur.getDate()+1); } } $('planGHdr').innerHTML=`
    ${hdrHtml}
    `; // Phase color map const PCOLORS=['#8b6f47','#3a5f8b','#4a7c59','#8b3a3a','#c9a84c','#6b4a8b','#3a6b8b','#7a3a6b','#4a6b4a']; const pColorIdx=new Map(); let pci=0; function getClr(t){ const k=t.phase||t.wbs?.split('.')[0]||'0'; if(!pColorIdx.has(k))pColorIdx.set(k,PCOLORS[pci++%PCOLORS.length]); return pColorIdx.get(k); } // Active baseline for overlay bars const blActive=(_blData(pid).baselines||[]).find(b=>b.isActive); const blMap=blActive?new Map(blActive.tasks.map(bt=>[bt.taskId,bt])):null; // Row map for dependency arrows const rowMap=new Map(vis.map((t,i)=>[t.id,i])); // SVG paths for dependency lines let svgPaths=''; vis.forEach((t,ri)=>{ (t.predecessors||[]).forEach(pred=>{ const pri=rowMap.get(pred.id); if(pri===undefined)return; const predT=allTasks.find(x=>x.id===pred.id); if(!predT||!predT.end||!t.start)return; const fx=toX(predT.end)+colW, fy=pri*ROW_H+ROW_H/2; const tx=toX(t.start), ty=ri*ROW_H+ROW_H/2; const isCritLine=t.isCritical&&predT.isCritical; const clr=isCritLine?'#c47a7a':'#c4b898'; const cp=Math.abs(ty-fy)/2; svgPaths+=``; }); }); // Build rows HTML const totH=vis.length*ROW_H; let rowsHtml=`
    `; // Week grid lines if(scale!=='day'){ let gc=new Date(gS+'T00:00:00'); const ge=new Date(gE+'T00:00:00'); while(gc<=ge){if(gc.getDay()===1){rowsHtml+=`
    `;}gc.setDate(gc.getDate()+1);} } // Today line rowsHtml+=`
    `; // Task rows & bars vis.forEach((t,i)=>{ const y=i*ROW_H; const isSm=t.isSummary,isMil=t.type==='milestone',isCrit=t.isCritical; const clr=isCrit?'#8b3a3a':getClr(t); rowsHtml+=`
    `; // Baseline bar if(blMap&&t.id&&blMap.has(t.id)){ const bt=blMap.get(t.id); if(bt.blStart&&bt.blEnd){ const bx=toX(bt.blStart),bw=toW(bt.blStart,bt.blEnd); rowsHtml+=`
    `; } } // Current bar if(t.start&&t.end){ if(isMil){ const mx=toX(t.start); rowsHtml+=`
    `; }else{ const bx=toX(t.start),bw=toW(t.start,t.end); const prog=Math.round(bw*((t.progress||0)/100)); const bg=isCrit?`linear-gradient(90deg,#8b3a3a,#c47a7a)`:`linear-gradient(90deg,${clr},${clr}bb)`; const top=isSm?'top:11px;height:10px':'top:7px;height:18px'; const rad=isSm?'border-radius:2px':'border-radius:3px'; const lbl=(bw>50&&!isSm)?`${t.name}`:''; rowsHtml+=`
    ${lbl}
    `; } } rowsHtml+='
    '; }); // Dependency SVG overlay rowsHtml+=``; rowsHtml+='
    '; $('planGRows').innerHTML=rowsHtml; // Sync scroll heights $('planGanttPane').style.height=''; } // ── Status bar function _pStatusBar(pid){ const tasks=_pData(pid).filter(t=>!t.isSummary&&t.type!=='milestone'); const crit=tasks.filter(t=>t.isCritical).length; const ends=tasks.map(t=>t.end).filter(Boolean).sort(); const starts=tasks.map(t=>t.start).filter(Boolean).sort(); const projDur=starts.length&&ends.length?_pDiff(starts[0],ends[ends.length-1]):null; $('psbTasks').innerHTML=`${tasks.length} task${tasks.length!==1?'s':''}`; $('psbCrit').innerHTML=`${crit} critical`; $('psbDur').textContent=projDur!==null?`Project: ${projDur} days`:'Project: -'; $('psbEnd').textContent=ends.length?`End: ${_pFmtShow(ends[ends.length-1])}`:'End: -'; const sel=_pSel?_pData(pid).find(t=>t.id===_pSel):null; $('psbSel').textContent=sel?`▸ ${sel.wbs||''} ${sel.name}`:''; $('planDelBtn').style.display=_pSel?'':'none'; } // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // INTERACTION - Task management // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // ── Select a row function planSel(id){ _pSel=id; document.querySelectorAll('#planBody tr').forEach(tr=>tr.classList.remove('psel')); const row=document.getElementById('pr-'+id); if(row)row.classList.add('psel'); _pStatusBar(S.proj?.id); $('planDelBtn').style.display=id?'':'none'; } // ── Toggle summary collapse function planToggle(id){ const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid)return; const t=_pData(pid).find(x=>x.id===id); if(t){t.collapsed=!t.collapsed;} renderPlanGrid(); renderPlanGantt(); } // ── Expand all function planExpandAll(){ const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid)return; _pData(pid).forEach(t=>t.collapsed=false); renderPlanner(); } // ── Add task / milestone / summary function planAdd(type){ const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid)return; const rs=TaskService.addPlannerTask(pid,_pSel,type,S.proj||{}); if(!rs.ok)return; _pSel=rs.newTaskId; renderPlanner(); // Immediately open name for editing setTimeout(()=>planDblClick(null,rs.newTaskId,'name'),80); } // ── Delete selected task function planDeleteSel(){ const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid||!_pSel)return; const tasks=_pData(pid); const t=tasks.find(x=>x.id===_pSel); if(!t)return; if(t.isSummary&&!confirm(`Delete summary task "${t.name}" and all its children?`))return; const rs=TaskService.deletePlannerTask(pid,_pSel); if(!rs.ok)return; _pSel=null; renderPlanner(); } // ── Indent selected task (make child of row above) function planIndent(){ const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid||!_pSel)return; const rs=TaskService.indentPlannerTask(pid,_pSel); if(!rs.ok)return; renderPlanner(); } // ── Outdent selected task function planOutdent(){ const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid||!_pSel)return; const rs=TaskService.outdentPlannerTask(pid,_pSel); if(!rs.ok)return; renderPlanner(); } // ── Sync _PT ordering to match canonical task ordering (Phase 4) // Called after Task Sheet mvUp/mvDn so the Planner stays ordered consistently. // Preserves all Planner-specific fields (indent, isSummary, collapsed, etc.) // while reordering rows to match the canonical task sequence from Store. function _syncPTOrder(pid){ const rtTasks=Store.getTasksByProject(pid); if(!_pHas(pid)||!rtTasks.length)return; const rtOrder=rtTasks.map(t=>t.id); const rtSet=new Set(rtOrder); const ptMap=new Map(_pData(pid).map(t=>[t.id,t])); // Rebuild PT in canonical task order; any PT-only tasks go at end const reordered=rtOrder.map(id=>ptMap.get(id)).filter(Boolean); _pData(pid).forEach(t=>{if(!rtSet.has(t.id))reordered.push(t);}); _pReplace(pid,reordered); _persistPlannerStore(); } // ── Move row up function planMoveUp(){ const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid||!_pSel)return; const rs=TaskService.movePlannerTaskByStep(pid,_pSel,-1); if(!rs.ok)return; renderPlanner(); } // ── Move row down function planMoveDown(){ const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid||!_pSel)return; const rs=TaskService.movePlannerTaskByStep(pid,_pSel,1); if(!rs.ok)return; renderPlanner(); } // ── Run auto-schedule button function planAutoSchedule(){ const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid)return; Scheduler.scheduleProject(pid); renderPlanner(); toast('Schedule recalculated','success'); } // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // INLINE EDITING // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function planDbl(e,id,field){ if(e)e.stopPropagation(); planDblClick(e,id,field); } function planDblClick(e,id,field){ if(e)e.stopPropagation(); // Cancel any active edit first if(_pEdit)_pEditCommit(true); const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid)return; const tasks=_pData(pid); const t=tasks.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!t)return; if(t.isSummary&&(field==='dur'||field==='preds'||field==='prog'))return; // Map field to cell ID and current value const cellId=`pc-${id}-${field}`; const cell=document.getElementById(cellId); if(!cell)return; _pEdit={id,field}; planSel(id); let curVal=''; if(field==='name')curVal=t.name||''; else if(field==='dur')curVal=String(t.duration||1); else if(field==='start')curVal=t.start||''; else if(field==='end')curVal=t.end||''; else if(field==='preds')curVal=_pPredsStr(t.predecessors,tasks)==='-'?'':_pPredsStr(t.predecessors,tasks); else if(field==='prog')curVal=String(t.progress||0); // Build input type const isDate=field==='start'||field==='end'; const isNum=field==='dur'||field==='prog'; const inp=document.createElement('input'); inp.type=isDate?'date':isNum?'number':'text'; if(isNum){inp.min='0';if(field==='prog')inp.max='100';} inp.value=curVal; inp.className='plan-edit-inp'; inp.onblur=()=>_pEditCommit(false); inp.onkeydown=e=>{ if(e.key==='Enter'){e.preventDefault();_pEditCommit(false);} else if(e.key==='Escape'){_pEditCommit(true);} else if(e.key==='Tab'){ e.preventDefault(); const order=['name','dur','start','end','preds','prog']; const ni=order.indexOf(field); _pEditCommit(false); const nextField=order[(ni+1)%order.length]; setTimeout(()=>planDblClick(null,id,nextField),30); } }; const wrap=document.createElement('div'); wrap.className='plan-edit-wrap'; wrap.appendChild(inp); cell.style.position='relative'; cell.appendChild(wrap); inp.focus(); if(!isDate)inp.select(); } function _pEditCommit(cancel){ if(!_pEdit)return; const {id,field}=_pEdit; _pEdit=null; const wrap=document.querySelector('.plan-edit-wrap'); const inp=wrap?.querySelector('input'); const val=inp?inp.value.trim():''; wrap?.remove(); if(cancel)return; const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid)return; const tasks=_pData(pid); const t=tasks.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!t)return; _pSnapshot(pid); if(field==='name'){ t.name=val||'New Task'; }else if(field==='dur'){ const d=parseInt(val)||1; t.duration=Math.max(0,d); if(t.start&&t.duration>0)t.end=_pAdd(t.start,t.duration-1); }else if(field==='start'){ if(val){ t.start=val; if(t.duration&&t.duration>0)t.end=_pAdd(val,t.duration-1); } }else if(field==='end'){ if(val){ t.end=val; if(t.start){const d=(_pDiff(t.start,val)||0)+1;t.duration=Math.max(1,d);} } }else if(field==='preds'){ t.predecessors=_pParsePreds(val,tasks); }else if(field==='prog'){ t.progress=Math.min(100,Math.max(0,parseInt(val)||0)); } _pSet(pid,tasks); Scheduler.scheduleProject(pid); renderPlanner(); // Refresh task panel if open if(planTPTaskId===id)_planTPFill(id); } // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // IMPORT / EXPORT // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // ── Import tasks from the existing task sheet into the planner function planImport(){ const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid)return; const curTasks=Store.getTasksByProject(pid); if(!curTasks.length){toast('No tasks found in task sheet','warning');return;} if(_pData(pid).length&&!confirm('Replace current plan with tasks from the Task Sheet?'))return; _pSnapshot(pid); // Group by phase → subphase → task const phaseMap=new Map(); curTasks.forEach(t=>{ const ph=t.phaseName||'General'; const sp=t.subphaseName||''; if(!phaseMap.has(ph))phaseMap.set(ph,new Map()); if(!phaseMap.get(ph).has(sp))phaseMap.get(ph).set(sp,[]); phaseMap.get(ph).get(sp).push(t); }); const newPlan=[]; phaseMap.forEach((spMap,ph)=>{ // Phase summary row (indent 0) newPlan.push({id:_pId(),type:'summary',name:ph,indent:0,duration:0,start:'',end:'',predecessors:[],progress:0,isSummary:true,collapsed:false}); spMap.forEach((tasks,sp)=>{ // Skip subphase header when it duplicates the phase (same name or prefix match) const _n2=s=>s.trim().toLowerCase(); const _phN=_n2(ph),_spN=_n2(sp||''); const spIsDuplicate=!sp||_phN===_spN|| (_phN.length>=4&&_spN.length>=4&&(_phN.startsWith(_spN)||_spN.startsWith(_phN))); if(sp&&!spIsDuplicate){ // Subphase row (indent 1) newPlan.push({id:_pId(),type:'summary',name:sp,indent:1,duration:0,start:'',end:'',predecessors:[],progress:0,isSummary:true,collapsed:false}); } tasks.forEach(t=>{ newPlan.push({ id:t.id, // keep same ID for baseline linking type:t.milestone?'milestone':'task', name:t.name, indent:spIsDuplicate?1:2, duration:t.duration||(_pDiff(t.startDate,t.endDate)||0)+1, start:t.baselineStart||t.startDate||'', end:t.baselineEnd||t.endDate||'', predecessors:(t.predecessors||[]).map(p=>({id:p.id,type:p.type||'FS',lag:0})), progress:t.progress||0, resources:t.assignee||'', notes:t.notes||'', isSummary:false,collapsed:false, phase:t.phaseId }); }); }); }); _pSet(pid,newPlan); renderPlanner(); toast(`Imported ${curTasks.length} tasks into Planner`,'success'); } // ── Save current plan as a new baseline version // _pSet maps start/end → startDate/endDate on sync, so the // canonical doCreateBaseline() reads correct Task Sheet dates for all views. function planSaveBaseline(){ const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid)return; if(!_blCanCreate()){toast('Only Project Managers or Administrators can create baselines','warning');return;} const tasks=_pData(pid); const nonSum=tasks.filter(t=>!t.isSummary&&(t.start||t.startDate)&&(t.end||t.endDate)); if(!nonSum.length){toast('No scheduled tasks to save as baseline','warning');return;} // Pre-populate create modal then open - doCreateBaseline() reads from DB.tasks() // which now contains Planner tasks (synced via _pSet with correct startDate/endDate) $('blc-name').value='Plan Export '+new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'2-digit',year:'numeric'}); $('blc-desc').value='Saved from Planner - '+nonSum.length+' tasks'; $('blc-source').value='current'; openMod('blCreateMod'); } // ── Sync vertical scroll between grid and gantt panes function syncPlanScroll(src){ const grid=$('planGridPane'); const gantt=$('planGanttPane'); if(!grid||!gantt)return; if(src===grid)gantt.scrollTop=grid.scrollTop; else grid.scrollTop=gantt.scrollTop; } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // CONTEXT MENU - right-click on planner row // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function planContextMenu(e,id){ e.preventDefault(); planSel(id); // Remove existing context menus document.querySelectorAll('.plan-ctx').forEach(m=>m.remove()); const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid)return; const tasks=_pData(pid); const t=tasks.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!t)return; const menu=document.createElement('div'); menu.className='ctx-menu plan-ctx open'; menu.style.cssText=`left:${Math.min(e.clientX,window.innerWidth-180)}px;top:${Math.min(e.clientY,window.innerHeight-200)}px`; menu.innerHTML=`
    📋 Task Details
    🔗 Edit Dependencies
    + Add Task Below
    → Indent (make child)
    ← Outdent (promote)
    ↑ Move Up
    ↓ Move Down
    🗑 Delete Task
    `; document.body.appendChild(menu); const dismiss=()=>{menu.remove();document.removeEventListener('click',dismiss);}; setTimeout(()=>document.addEventListener('click',dismiss),50); } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // TASK DETAIL PANEL (right-side slide panel for Planner) // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ let planTPTaskId=null; function openPlanTP(id){ const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid)return; planTPTaskId=id; _planTPFill(id); $('planTP').classList.add('active'); $('planTPPanel').classList.add('open'); } function closePlanTP(){ planTPTaskId=null; $('planTP').classList.remove('active'); $('planTPPanel').classList.remove('open'); } function _planTPFill(id){ const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid)return; const tasks=_pData(pid); const t=tasks.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!t)return; $('planTPTitle').textContent=t.name||'Unnamed Task'; $('planTPWBS').textContent=t.wbs?`WBS: ${t.wbs}`:''; $('planTPStart').value=t.start||''; $('planTPEnd').value=t.end||''; $('planTPDur').value=t.duration||1; $('planTPProg').value=t.progress||0; $('planTPType').textContent=t.type==='milestone'?'Milestone':t.isSummary?'Summary/Phase':'Task'; $('planTPRes').value=t.resources||''; // Fix 6: Render append-only notes list from task data _renderNotesList('planTPNotesList',t.notes); const _pIn=$('planTPNoteInput');if(_pIn)_pIn.value=''; // Float const flt=t.float; $('planTPFloat').innerHTML=flt===null||flt===undefined?'-': flt===0?`0d - CRITICAL`: flt<=3?`${flt} days`: `${flt} days`; $('planTPCrit').innerHTML=t.isCritical?`Yes - on critical path`: `No`; // Dependencies const predStr=(t.predecessors||[]).map(p=>{ const pt=tasks.find(x=>x.id===p.id); const ty=p.type&&p.type!=='FS'?` (${p.type})`:''; const lg=p.lag?` [lag:${p.lag>0?'+':''}${p.lag}d]`:''; return `
    ${pt?pt.wbs+' - '+pt.name:p.id}${ty}${lg}
    `; }).join(''); $('planTPDeps').innerHTML=predStr||`No predecessors`; } function planTPUpdate(field,val){ const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid||!planTPTaskId)return; const tasks=_pData(pid); const t=tasks.find(x=>x.id===planTPTaskId); if(!t)return; _pSnapshot(pid); if(field==='start'){ t.start=val; if(t.duration&&t.duration>0)t.end=_pAdd(val,t.duration-1); }else if(field==='end'){ t.end=val; if(t.start){const d=(_pDiff(t.start,val)||0)+1;t.duration=Math.max(1,d);} }else if(field==='dur'){ t.duration=Math.max(1,parseInt(val)||1); if(t.start)t.end=_pAdd(t.start,t.duration-1); }else if(field==='progress'){ t.progress=Math.min(100,Math.max(0,parseInt(val)||0)); }else if(field==='resources'){ t.resources=val; } // Fix 6: 'notes' field removed - notes are append-only via addNoteFromPlanTP() _pSet(pid,tasks); Scheduler.scheduleProject(pid); renderPlanner(); _planTPFill(planTPTaskId); } function planTPDelete(){ if(!planTPTaskId)return; _pSel=planTPTaskId; closePlanTP(); planDeleteSel(); } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // DEPENDENCY EDITOR MODAL // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ let _depEditorTaskId=null; function openDepEditor(id){ const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid)return; const tasks=_pData(pid); const t=tasks.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!t)return; _depEditorTaskId=id; $('depEditTaskName').textContent=`${t.wbs||''} - ${t.name}`; // Build rows depEditorRebuild(tasks,t.predecessors||[]); openMod('depEditorMod'); } function depEditorRebuild(tasks,preds){ const pid=S.proj?.id; const allTasks=tasks||_pData(pid); const taskId=_depEditorTaskId; const rows=$('depEditorRows'); rows.innerHTML=''; preds.forEach((p,i)=>rows.appendChild(_depRow(allTasks,p,i,taskId))); if(!preds.length){ rows.innerHTML=`
    No predecessors. Click + Add Predecessor to set dependencies.
    `; } } function _depRow(allTasks,pred,idx,selfId){ const el=document.createElement('div'); el.className='dep-row'; el.dataset.idx=idx; // Task select options - exclude self and descendant (basic check) const opts=allTasks.filter(t=>t.id!==selfId&&!t.isSummary&&t.type!=='milestone') .map(t=>``).join(''); el.innerHTML=` `; return el; } // live update of dep row values const _depTemp={}; function depRowUpdate(idx,field,val){ if(!_depTemp[idx])_depTemp[idx]={}; _depTemp[idx][field]=field==='lag'?parseInt(val)||0:val; } function depEditorAddRow(){ const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid)return; const tasks=_pData(pid); const rows=$('depEditorRows'); // Commit any temp changes to existing rows first const preds=_depEditorGetCurrent(); const newPred={id:'',type:'FS',lag:0}; preds.push(newPred); depEditorRebuild(tasks,preds); } function depEditorRemove(idx){ const preds=_depEditorGetCurrent(); preds.splice(idx,1); const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid)return; const tasks=_pData(pid); depEditorRebuild(tasks,preds); } function _depEditorGetCurrent(){ // Read from all current dep-row DOM elements const rows=document.querySelectorAll('.dep-row'); const preds=[]; rows.forEach(row=>{ const sel=row.querySelector('.dep-pred-sel'); const typeSel=row.querySelector('.dep-type-sel'); const lagInp=row.querySelector('input[type=number]'); const id=sel?sel.value:''; const type=typeSel?typeSel.value:'FS'; const lag=lagInp?parseInt(lagInp.value)||0:0; if(id)preds.push({id,type,lag}); }); return preds; } function depEditorSave(){ const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid||!_depEditorTaskId)return; const preds=_depEditorGetCurrent(); // Validate: no self-reference if(preds.some(p=>p.id===_depEditorTaskId)){ toast('A task cannot be its own predecessor','error'); return; } _pSnapshot(pid); const rs=TaskService.savePlannerDependencies(pid,_depEditorTaskId,preds); if(!rs.ok){if(rs.error)toast(rs.error,'error');return;} closeMod('depEditorMod'); renderPlanner(); if(planTPTaskId===_depEditorTaskId)_planTPFill(_depEditorTaskId); toast(`Dependencies updated - ${preds.length} predecessor${preds.length!==1?'s':''}`, 'success'); } // ── Keyboard shortcuts for planner document.addEventListener('keydown',function(e){ if(S.tab!=='tplan'||_pEdit)return; if(e.target.tagName==='INPUT'||e.target.tagName==='TEXTAREA'||e.target.tagName==='SELECT')return; const pid=S.proj?.id; if(!pid)return; if(e.key==='Insert'||(e.key==='Enter'&&e.ctrlKey)){e.preventDefault();planAdd('task');} else if(e.key==='Delete'&&_pSel){e.preventDefault();planDeleteSel();} else if(e.key==='Tab'&&_pSel&&!e.ctrlKey&&!e.altKey){e.preventDefault();e.shiftKey?planOutdent():planIndent();} else if(e.key==='ArrowUp'&&e.altKey&&_pSel){e.preventDefault();planMoveUp();} else if(e.key==='ArrowDown'&&e.altKey&&_pSel){e.preventDefault();planMoveDown();} else if(e.key==='F8'&&_pSel){e.preventDefault();openDepEditor(_pSel);} else if(e.key==='F9'&&_pSel){e.preventDefault();openPlanTP(_pSel);} else if(e.key==='Escape'){closePlanTP();} else if(e.key==='z'&&(e.ctrlKey||e.metaKey)){ e.preventDefault(); if(_pUndo[pid]&&_pUndo[pid].length){ _pReplace(pid,JSON.parse(_pUndo[pid].pop())); renderPlanner(); toast('Undo','success'); } } }); // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // CRITICAL PATH // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function renderCP(){ if(!S.proj)return; const pid=S.proj.id; const source=($('cpSource')?.value)||'planner'; const showAll=($('cpShowAll')?.checked)!==false; // ── Get tasks: prefer Planner data; fall back to Task Sheet (auto-wired) if Planner is empty let tasks=[]; let usingFallback=false; if(source==='planner'){ Scheduler.scheduleProject(pid); // ensure CPM is fresh tasks=_pData(pid).filter(t=>!t.isSummary&&t.type!=='milestone'&&t.start&&t.end); } // If planner source selected but empty, fall back to Task Sheet (no auto-wiring). // Uses canonical scheduler pipeline through Scheduler facade. if(!tasks.length){ usingFallback=(source==='planner'); const rawTs=Store.getTasksByProject(pid); tasks=rawTs.map(t=>({ id:t.id,name:t.name,start:t.startDate,end:t.endDate, duration:t.duration||(_pDiff(t.startDate,t.endDate)||0)+1, predecessors:(t.predecessors||[]).map(p=>({id:p.id,type:p.type||'FS',lag:p.lag||0})), progress:t.progress||0,resources:t.assignee||'', isSummary:false,isCritical:false,float:null, })); Scheduler.scheduleTaskList(tasks); } else if(source!=='planner'){ // Explicit task-sheet selection: read stored deps only, run canonical CPM const rawTs=Store.getTasksByProject(pid); tasks=rawTs.map(t=>({ id:t.id,name:t.name,start:t.startDate,end:t.endDate, duration:t.duration||(_pDiff(t.startDate,t.endDate)||0)+1, predecessors:(t.predecessors||[]).map(p=>({id:p.id,type:p.type||'FS',lag:p.lag||0})), progress:t.progress||0,resources:t.assignee||'', isSummary:false,isCritical:false,float:null, })); Scheduler.scheduleTaskList(tasks); } // Still nothing after all fallbacks if(!tasks.length){ $('cpSummary').style.display='none'; $('cpChain').style.display='none'; $('cpInf').style.display='none'; $('cpContent').innerHTML=`
    📋
    No tasks found
    Add tasks to the Task Sheet or Planner to see the critical path.
    `; return; } const critTasks=tasks.filter(t=>t.isCritical); const nearCritTasks=tasks.filter(t=>!t.isCritical&&t.float!==null&&t.float<=3&&t.float>0); const hasDeps=tasks.some(t=>(t.predecessors||[]).length>0); // ── Project end date const projEnd=tasks.map(t=>t.end).filter(Boolean).sort().slice(-1)[0]||'-'; const projStart=tasks.map(t=>t.start).filter(Boolean).sort()[0]||'-'; const projDur=projStart&&projEnd?(_pDiff(projStart,projEnd)||0)+1:0; // ── Info banner const infEl=$('cpInf'); if(hasDeps){ infEl.style.display='block'; infEl.innerHTML=`Critical Path: ${critTasks.length} task${critTasks.length!==1?'s':''} on the critical path  ·  ${nearCritTasks.length} near-critical (≤3d float)  ·  Project end: ${_pFmtShow(projEnd)} (${projDur} days). Any delay to a critical task directly extends the project finish.`; }else{ infEl.style.display='block'; infEl.style.background='var(--blue-pale)'; infEl.style.borderColor='var(--blue)'; infEl.style.color='var(--blue)'; infEl.innerHTML=`ℹ️ No dependencies defined between tasks. Add predecessors in the Planner tab to enable critical path calculation. Showing all tasks sorted by start date.`; } // ── Summary strip const sumEl=$('cpSummary'); sumEl.style.display='flex'; sumEl.innerHTML=`
    Total Tasks
    ${tasks.length}
    Critical
    ${critTasks.length}
    Near-Critical
    ${nearCritTasks.length}
    Projected End
    ${_pFmtShow(projEnd)}
    Project Duration
    ${projDur}d
    `; // ── Critical chain visualization const chainEl=$('cpChain'); if(critTasks.length>0&&hasDeps){ // Build the critical chain: trace from latest finish backwards const taskMap=new Map(tasks.map(t=>[t.id,t])); const critEnd=critTasks.map(t=>t.end).filter(Boolean).sort().slice(-1)[0]; const chain=[]; let cur=critTasks.find(t=>t.end===critEnd&&t.isCritical); const visited=new Set(); while(cur&&!visited.has(cur.id)){ chain.unshift(cur); visited.add(cur.id); // Find critical predecessor const predIds=(cur.predecessors||[]).map(p=>p.id); const critPreds=predIds.map(id=>taskMap.get(id)).filter(t=>t&&t.isCritical); // Take the one with latest end cur=critPreds.length?critPreds.reduce((a,b)=>(!a||b.end>a.end)?b:a,null):null; } chainEl.style.display='block'; chainEl.innerHTML=`
    CRITICAL CHAIN:${ chain.map((t,i)=>`${i>0?'→':''}${t.name} ${_pFmtShow(t.end)}`).join('') }
    `; }else{ chainEl.style.display='none'; } // ── Table const rows=showAll?tasks:critTasks.concat(nearCritTasks); const sorted=[...rows].sort((a,b)=>((a.start||'')>(b.start||''))?1:-1); if(!sorted.length){ $('cpContent').innerHTML=`
    ✅
    No tasks to display
    All tasks have slack - no critical path tasks found.
    `; return; } $('cpContent').innerHTML=`${sorted.map(t=>{ const flt=t.float; const fltBadge=flt===null?'-': flt===0?`0d CRITICAL`: flt<=3?`${flt}d`: `${flt}d`; const predStr=(t.predecessors||[]).map(p=>{ const pt=tasks.find(x=>x.id===p.id); return `${pt?pt.name||p.id:p.id}${p.type&&p.type!=='FS'?' ('+p.type+')':''}${p.lag?' +'+p.lag+'d':''}`; }).join(', ')||'-'; const rowClass=t.isCritical?'style="background:rgba(139,58,58,.04)"':''; return ``; }).join('')}
    Task NameStartFinishDur FloatStatusPredecessors% Done
    ${t.isCritical?'':''}${t.name} ${_pFmtShow(t.start)} ${_pFmtShow(t.end)} ${t.duration||'-'}d ${fltBadge} ${t.isCritical?'Critical':t.float!==null&&t.float<=3?'Near-Critical':'Normal'} ${predStr} ${t.progress||0}%
    `; } // helper to switch tab by ID function swTabById(id){ const btn=document.querySelector(`.vtab[onclick*="'${id}'"]`); if(btn)swTab(btn,id); } // ============================================================ // CALENDAR // ============================================================ function renderCal(){ if(!S.proj)return; const ts=Store.getTasksByProject(S.proj.id); const y=S.calY,m=S.calM; const mNames=['January','February','March','April','May','June','July','August','September','October','November','December']; $('calTitle').textContent=mNames[m]+' '+y; const fd=new Date(y,m,1).getDay(),dim=new Date(y,m+1,0).getDate(); const today=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]; const days=['Sun','Mon','Tue','Wed','Thu','Fri','Sat']; let html=days.map(d=>`
    ${d}
    `).join(''); for(let i=0;i`; for(let d=1;d<=dim;d++){ const ds=`${y}-${String(m+1).padStart(2,'0')}-${String(d).padStart(2,'0')}`; const isTday=ds===today; // Show all tasks that are active (span across) this day, not just exact start/end matches const dts=ts.filter(t=>t.startDate&&t.endDate&&t.startDate<=ds&&t.endDate>=ds); html+=`
    ${d}${dts.length?'':''}
    ${dts.slice(0,2).map(t=>`
    ${t.name.slice(0,18)}${t.name.length>18?'…':''}
    `).join('')} ${dts.length>2?`
    +${dts.length-2} more
    `:''}
    `; } $('calGrid').innerHTML=html; } function calNav(d){S.calM+=d;if(S.calM>11){S.calM=0;S.calY++;}if(S.calM<0){S.calM=11;S.calY--;}renderCal();} function calDayClick(ds,ids){ if(!ids||!ids.length)return; const ts=Store.getTasksByProject(S.proj?.id); const dayTasks=ids.map(id=>ts.find(t=>t.id===id)).filter(Boolean); if(!dayTasks.length)return; if(dayTasks.length===1){openTP(dayTasks[0].id);return;} // Show a popover listing all tasks for the day const sc={'not-started':'var(--text-light)','in-progress':'var(--blue)','completed':'var(--success)','blocked':'var(--danger)','on-hold':'#6b4a8b'}; const fmtD=d=>d?new Date(d+'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'2-digit'}):'-'; let html=`
    Tasks on ${fmtD(ds)}
    `; dayTasks.forEach(t=>{ html+=`
    ${t.name}
    ${slt(t.status)} ${t.priority} ${t.assignee?`${t.assignee}`:''} ${fmtD(t.startDate)} – ${fmtD(t.endDate)}
    `; }); html+='
    '; // Remove existing popover if any document.querySelectorAll('.cal-day-pop').forEach(el=>el.remove()); const wrap=document.createElement('div'); wrap.className='cal-day-pop'; wrap.style.cssText='position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:799;background:rgba(0,0,0,.3)'; wrap.innerHTML=html; wrap.addEventListener('click',e=>{if(e.target===wrap)wrap.remove();}); document.body.appendChild(wrap); } // ============================================================ // REPORTS // ============================================================ function getRptDateFilter(){ const from=$('rptFrom')?.value||''; const to=$('rptTo')?.value||''; return{from,to}; } function applyRptDateFilter(ts){ const{from,to}=getRptDateFilter(); if(!from&&!to)return ts; return ts.filter(t=>{ const s=t.startDate||''; const e=t.endDate||s; if(from&&e&&eto)return false; return true; }); } function getRptDateLabel(){ const{from,to}=getRptDateFilter(); if(!from&&!to)return'All dates'; if(from&&to)return fmt(from)+' – '+fmt(to); if(from)return'From '+fmt(from); return'Up to '+fmt(to); } function clearRptDates(){ const f=$('rptFrom');const t=$('rptTo'); if(f)f.value='';if(t)t.value=''; $('rptOut').innerHTML=''; } function onRptDateChange(){ $('rptOut').innerHTML=''; } function renderReports(){ const rpts=[ {i:'',n:'Task Summary',d:'All tasks breakdown',f:'rptTasks'}, {i:'',n:'Cost Report',d:'Budget vs actual analysis',f:'rptCosts'}, {i:'',n:'Resource Utilization',d:'Team workload & allocation',f:'rptRes'}, {i:'',n:'Overdue Tasks',d:'Tasks past due date',f:'rptOverdue'}, {i:'',n:'Milestone Report',d:'6 construction milestones & schedule',f:'rptMS'}, {i:'',n:'Blocked Tasks',d:'Currently blocked items',f:'rptBlocked'}, ]; $('rptGrid').innerHTML=rpts.map(r=>`
    ${r.n}
    ${r.d}
    `).join(''); $('rptOut').innerHTML=''; } function showRpt(title,html){ const rid='rpt'+Date.now(); $('rptOut').innerHTML=`
    ${title}
    ${html}
    `; $('rptOut').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'}); } function dlRptPDF(rid,title){ const el=document.getElementById(rid);if(!el)return; const proj=S.proj?S.proj.name:'Chanakya'; const w=window.open('','_blank'); if(!w){toast('Popup blocked - allow popups in your browser to export PDF','error');return;} w.document.write(''+title+''); w.document.write('

    '+title+'

    '); w.document.write('
    Chanakya  ·  '+proj+'  ·  Generated: '+new Date().toLocaleString('en-GB')+'
    '); w.document.write(el.innerHTML); w.document.write('window.onload=function(){setTimeout(function(){window.print();},400);}'); w.document.close(); toast('Report opened - use browser Print → Save as PDF','success'); } function dlRptCSV(rid,title){ const el=document.getElementById(rid);if(!el)return; const tables=el.querySelectorAll('table'); if(!tables.length)return toast('No table data to export','error'); let csv=''; tables.forEach(tbl=>{ tbl.querySelectorAll('tr').forEach(row=>{ const cells=[...row.querySelectorAll('th,td')].map(c=>'"'+c.innerText.replace(/"/g,'""').replace(/\n/g,' ')+'"'); csv+=cells.join(',')+'\n'; }); csv+='\n'; }); const blob=new Blob([csv],{type:'text/csv'}); const a=document.createElement('a'); a.href=URL.createObjectURL(blob); a.download=(S.proj?S.proj.code+'-':'')+title.replace(/\s+/g,'-')+'.csv'; a.click(); toast('CSV downloaded','success'); } function rptStatus(){ if(!S.proj)return showRpt('Project Status','
    Open a project first
