    '); const p=S.proj;const ts=Store.getTasksByProject(p.id); const done=ts.filter(t=>t.status==='completed').length; const pct=p.status==='completed'?100:_wPct(ts); const drem=p.end?Math.max(0,dBetween(new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],p.end)):0; showRpt('Project Status Report',`
    Progress
    ${pct}%
    Days Left
    ${drem}
    Budget
    ${fmtINR(p.budget)}
    Status
    ${slt(p.status)}
    ${PH.map(ph=>{const pt=ts.filter(t=>t.phaseId===ph.id);const pd=pt.filter(t=>t.status==='completed').length;const pp=pt.length?Math.round(pd/pt.length*100):0;return pt.length?``:'';}).join('')}
    PhaseTasksDone%
    ${ph.name}${pt.length}${pd}
    ${pp}%
    `); } function rptTasks(){ if(!S.proj)return showRpt('Task Summary','
    Open a project first
    '); const allTs=Store.getTasksByProject(S.proj.id); const ts=applyRptDateFilter(allTs); const dateLabel=getRptDateLabel(); const sc={'not-started':0,'in-progress':0,'completed':0,'blocked':0,'on-hold':0};ts.forEach(t=>{if(sc[t.status]!==undefined)sc[t.status]++;}); showRpt('Task Summary',`
    Period: ${dateLabel} · ${ts.length} task${ts.length!==1?'s':''}
    ${Object.entries(sc).map(([s,c])=>`
    ${c}
    ${slt(s)}
    `).join('')}
    ${ts.slice(0,100).map(t=>``).join('')}${ts.length>100?``:''}
    TaskPhaseSub-PhaseAssigneeStatus%StartFinish
    ${t.name}${t.phaseName}${t.subphaseName||'-'}${t.assignee||'-'}${slt(t.status)}${t.progress||0}%${fmt(t.startDate)}${fmt(t.endDate)}
    ... ${ts.length-100} more tasks
    `); } function rptCosts(){ if(!S.proj)return showRpt('Cost Report','
    Open a project first
    '); const p=S.proj;const ts=applyRptDateFilter(Store.getTasksByProject(p.id)); const dateLabel=getRptDateLabel(); // Cost data is not being tracked right now (cost field is hidden in Task modal). // Keep report values at 0 to avoid misleading "crore" displays from sample budgets. const tot=0,done=0,rem=0,pct=0; const phD={};ts.forEach(t=>{if(!phD[t.phaseId])phD[t.phaseId]={name:t.phaseName,pl:0,ac:0,n:0};phD[t.phaseId].pl+=t.cost||0;if(t.status==='completed')phD[t.phaseId].ac+=t.cost||0;phD[t.phaseId].n++;}); showRpt('Cost Report',`
    Period: ${dateLabel} · ${ts.length} task${ts.length!==1?'s':''}
    Total Budget
    ${fmtINR(0)}
    Planned Cost
    ${fmtINR(tot)}
    ${pct}% of budget
    Actual (Done)
    ${fmtINR(done)}
    Remaining
    ${fmtINR(rem)}
    ${rem<0?'Over':'Under'}
    ${Object.values(phD).map(ph=>{const v=ph.pl-ph.ac;return'';}).join('')}
    PhaseTasksPlannedActualVariance
    '+ph.name+''+ph.n+''+fmtINR(ph.pl)+''+fmtINR(ph.ac)+''+(v>=0?'+':'')+fmtINR(v)+'
    TOTAL${ts.length}${fmtINR(tot)}${fmtINR(done)}${fmtINR(rem)}
    `); } function rptRes(){ const res=Store.getResources();const ts=applyRptDateFilter(Store.getTasksByProject(S.proj?.id));const arr=Object.values(res);const dateLabel=getRptDateLabel(); if(!arr.length)return showRpt('Resource Utilization','
    No resources added
    '); showRpt('Resource Utilization',`
    Period: ${dateLabel}
    ${arr.map(r=>{const mt=ts.filter(t=>t.assignee===r.name);const dn=mt.filter(t=>t.status==='completed').length;const util=Math.min(150,Math.round(mt.length/Math.max(ts.length,1)*100*5));const cost=mt.reduce((a,t)=>a+(t.cost||0),0);return'';}).join('')}
    NameRoleTasksDoneUtilizationRate/DayEst. Cost
    '+r.name+''+r.role+''+mt.length+''+dn+''+(util>100?''+util+'%':''+util+'%')+''+fmtINR(r.rate)+''+fmtINR(cost)+'
    `); } function rptOverdue(){ if(!S.proj)return showRpt('Overdue Tasks','
    Open a project first
    '); const allTs=Store.getTasksByProject(S.proj.id);const tod=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]; const ts=applyRptDateFilter(allTs);const dateLabel=getRptDateLabel(); const ov=ts.filter(t=>t.endDate&&t.endDatePeriod: ${dateLabel}`+(ov.length?`${ov.map(t=>{const d=dBetween(t.endDate,tod);return``;}).join('')}
    TaskPhaseSub-PhaseAssigneeFinishDays OverStatus
    ${t.name}${t.phaseName}${t.subphaseName||'-'}${t.assignee||'-'}${fmt(t.endDate)}+${d}d${slt(t.status)}
    `:'
    No overdue tasks!
    ')); } function rptMS(){ if(!S.proj)return showRpt('Milestone Report','
    Open a project first
    '); const ts=applyRptDateFilter(Store.getTasksByProject(S.proj.id));const dateLabel=getRptDateLabel(); const today=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]; // Milestones = each Task-group (Phase + Sub-Phase) completion. // When all subtasks under a task-group are done, that task-group is a milestone. const groups={}; ts.forEach(t=>{ const ph=(t.phaseName||t.phaseId||'Unassigned Phase').trim()||'Unassigned Phase'; const sp=(t.subphaseName||t.name||'Untitled Task').trim()||'Untitled Task'; const k=ph+'|||'+sp; if(!groups[k])groups[k]={phase:ph,task:sp,tasks:[]}; groups[k].tasks.push(t); }); const rows=Object.values(groups).map(g=>{ const pt=g.tasks; const starts=pt.map(t=>t.startDate).filter(Boolean).sort(); const ends=pt.map(t=>t.endDate).filter(Boolean).sort(); const start=starts[0]||null;const end=ends[ends.length-1]||null; const dur=(start&&end)?dBetween(start,end):null; const blEnds=pt.map(t=>t.baselineEnd).filter(Boolean).sort(); const plannedEnd=blEnds.length?blEnds[blEnds.length-1]:null; const pct=_wPct(pt); let delay=0; if(plannedEnd&&end&&end>plannedEnd)delay=dBetween(plannedEnd,end); else if(!plannedEnd&&end&&end0?'in-progress':'not-started'; return{label:`${g.phase} - ${g.task}`,start,end,dur,pct,delay,mSt}; }).sort((a,b)=>(a.start||'').localeCompare(b.start||'')||a.label.localeCompare(b.label)); if(!rows.length){showRpt('Milestone Report',`
    Period: ${dateLabel}
    No phase data found
    `);return;} showRpt('Milestone Report',`
    Period: ${dateLabel}
    ${rows.map(r=>``).join('')}
    MilestoneStartEndDuration% DoneDelayStatus
    ${r.label} ${r.start?fmt(r.start):'-'} ${r.end?fmt(r.end):'-'} ${r.dur!=null?r.dur+' days':'-'}
    ${r.pct}%
    		 ${r.delay>0?'+'+r.delay+' days':'On Track'} ${slt(r.mSt)}
    `); } function rptBlocked(){ if(!S.proj)return showRpt('Blocked Tasks','
    Open a project first
    '); const ts=applyRptDateFilter(Store.getTasksByProject(S.proj.id));const dateLabel=getRptDateLabel(); const bl=ts.filter(t=>t.status==='blocked'); showRpt('Blocked Tasks',`
    Period: ${dateLabel}
    `+(bl.length?`${bl.map(t=>``).join('')}
    TaskPhaseSub-PhaseAssigneeNotes
    ${t.name}${t.phaseName}${t.subphaseName||'-'}${t.assignee||'-'}${t.notes||'-'}
    `:'
    No blocked tasks!
    ')); } function rptPhases(){ if(!S.proj)return showRpt('Phase Progress','
    Open a project first
    '); const ts=Store.getTasksByProject(S.proj.id); const data=PH.map(ph=>{const pt=ts.filter(t=>t.phaseId===ph.id);const done=pt.filter(t=>t.status==='completed').length;return{name:ph.name,total:pt.length,done,pct:pt.length?Math.round(done/pt.length*100):0,color:ph.color};}).filter(d=>d.total>0); showRpt('Phase Progress',`
    ${data.map(d=>`
    ${d.name}${d.done}/${d.total} · ${d.pct}%
    `).join('')}
    `); } // ============================================================ // CSV / EXCEL FILE IMPORTER (Google Sheets / Excel upload) // ============================================================ /** * GS - upload-based import state */ const GS = { headers: [], rows: [], type: 'villas', // 'villas' | 'tasks' villaMap: {}, taskMap: {}, workbook: null, // SheetJS workbook (Excel only) _preselectedPid: null, }; // ── TYPE TOGGLE ────────────────────────────────────────────── function gsTypeChanged(val){ GS.type = val || (document.querySelector('input[name="gs-type-radio"]:checked')||{}).value || 'villas'; const hint=$('gs-task-hint'); if(hint) hint.style.display=GS.type==='tasks'?'':'none'; // Clear mapper on type change; rows already loaded, just re-render mapper if(GS.rows.length){ if(GS.type==='villas') _gsRenderVillaMapper(); else _gsRenderTaskMapper(); } } // ── DROP / FILE PICK ───────────────────────────────────────── function gsHandleDrop(ev){ const file = ev.dataTransfer.files[0]; if(file) gsHandleFile(file); } /** * Entry point: called when user picks or drops a file. * Branches to CSV or Excel parser. */ function gsHandleFile(file){ if(!file) return; const stat = $('gs-fetch-status'); const mapper = $('gs-mapper'); if(stat){ stat.style.color='var(--text-muted)'; stat.textContent='Reading file…'; } if(mapper) mapper.innerHTML=''; const ext = file.name.split('.').pop().toLowerCase(); if(ext==='csv' || ext==='tsv'){ _gsReadCSV(file); } else if(ext==='xlsx' || ext==='xls'){ _gsReadExcel(file); } else { if(stat){ stat.style.color='var(--danger)'; stat.textContent='Unsupported format. Please upload a .csv or .xlsx file.'; } } } // ── CSV READER ─────────────────────────────────────────────── function _gsReadCSV(file){ const stat = $('gs-fetch-status'); const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = function(ev){ try{ const {headers, rows} = _parseCSV(ev.target.result); GS.workbook = null; GS.headers = headers; GS.rows = rows; // Hide sheet-tab selector (no sheets in CSV) const tabRow = $('gs-sheet-tab-row'); if(tabRow) tabRow.style.display='none'; if(stat){ stat.style.color='var(--success)'; stat.textContent=`✓ ${file.name} - ${rows.length} rows, ${headers.length} columns detected`; } _gsPostLoad(); }catch(err){ if(stat){ stat.style.color='var(--danger)'; stat.textContent='Failed to read CSV: '+err.message; } } }; reader.readAsText(file); } // ── EXCEL READER ───────────────────────────────────────────── function _gsReadExcel(file){ const stat = $('gs-fetch-status'); if(typeof XLSX==='undefined'){ if(stat){ stat.style.color='var(--danger)'; stat.textContent='Excel reader not loaded. Check your internet connection and reload.'; } return; } const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = function(ev){ try{ const wb = XLSX.read(ev.target.result, {type:'array', cellDates:true}); GS.workbook = wb; // Populate sheet selector const tabSel = $('gs-tab-sel'); if(tabSel){ tabSel.innerHTML = wb.SheetNames.map((n,i)=>``).join(''); } const tabRow = $('gs-sheet-tab-row'); const fileInfo = $('gs-file-info'); if(tabRow) tabRow.style.display=''; if(fileInfo) fileInfo.textContent=`${file.name} · ${wb.SheetNames.length} sheet${wb.SheetNames.length!==1?'s':''}`; // Load first sheet _gsLoadSheet(0, file.name, stat); }catch(err){ if(stat){ stat.style.color='var(--danger)'; stat.textContent='Failed to read Excel file: '+err.message; } } }; reader.readAsArrayBuffer(file); } function gsTabChanged(){ const sel = $('gs-tab-sel'); if(!sel || !GS.workbook) return; _gsLoadSheet(parseInt(sel.value)||0, '', $('gs-fetch-status')); } function _gsLoadSheet(sheetIdx, fileName, stat){ try{ const wb = GS.workbook; const sheetName = wb.SheetNames[sheetIdx]; const ws = wb.Sheets[sheetName]; const raw = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json(ws, {header:1, raw:false, dateNF:'YYYY-MM-DD'}); if(!raw.length){ if(stat){ stat.style.color='var(--danger)'; stat.textContent='Sheet "'+sheetName+'" is empty.'; } return; } // First non-empty row = headers let hi = raw.findIndex(r=>r.some(c=>c!=null&&String(c).trim()!='')); if(hi<0) hi=0; GS.headers = (raw[hi]||[]).map(c=>String(c==null?'':c).trim()); GS.rows = raw.slice(hi+1).filter(r=>r.some(c=>c!=null&&String(c).trim()!='')) .map(r=>GS.headers.map((_,i)=>String(r[i]==null?'':r[i]).trim())); const info = fileName ? `${fileName} · Sheet: "${sheetName}"` : `Sheet: "${sheetName}"`; if(stat){ stat.style.color='var(--success)'; stat.textContent=`✓ ${info} - ${GS.rows.length} rows, ${GS.headers.length} columns`; } _gsPostLoad(); }catch(err){ if(stat){ stat.style.color='var(--danger)'; stat.textContent='Error reading sheet: '+err.message; } } } function _gsPostLoad(){ GS.type = (document.querySelector('input[name="gs-type-radio"]:checked')||{}).value || 'villas'; if(GS.type==='villas') _gsRenderVillaMapper(); else _gsRenderTaskMapper(); } // ── VILLA COLUMN MAPPER ────────────────────────────────────── function _gsRenderVillaMapper(){ const h = GS.headers; GS.villaMap = { code: _guessCol(h,['code','wl-v','id','proj','villa id','project id']), name: _guessCol(h,['name','villa','title','project name']), status: _guessCol(h,['status','state']), phase: _guessCol(h,['phase','block','section']), zone: _guessCol(h,['zone','sector','cluster']), start: _guessCol(h,['start','begin','commencement','start date']), end: _guessCol(h,['end','finish','completion','handover','end date']), budget: _guessCol(h,['budget','cost','amount','value','contract value']), pm: _guessCol(h,['pm','manager','responsible','project manager']), contractor: _guessCol(h,['contractor','vendor','agency']), area: _guessCol(h,['area','sqft','sq ft','built-up']), notes: _guessCol(h,['notes','remarks','comment','description']), }; const opts = ['', ...h.map((hd,i)=>``) ].join(''); const fields = [ {k:'code', lbl:'Villa / Project Code', req:true}, {k:'name', lbl:'Villa / Project Name', req:true}, {k:'status', lbl:'Status', req:false}, {k:'phase', lbl:'Phase', req:false}, {k:'zone', lbl:'Zone', req:false}, {k:'start', lbl:'Start Date', req:false}, {k:'end', lbl:'End / Handover Date', req:false}, {k:'budget', lbl:'Budget (₹)', req:false}, {k:'pm', lbl:'Project Manager', req:false}, {k:'contractor',lbl:'Contractor', req:false}, {k:'area', lbl:'Built-up Area (sqft)', req:false}, {k:'notes', lbl:'Notes / Remarks', req:false}, ]; const mapper = $('gs-mapper'); if(!mapper) return; mapper.innerHTML = `
    Map columns - ${GS.rows.length} rows detected. Auto-detected columns are pre-selected. Adjust any mismatches before importing.
    ${fields.map(f=>`
    `).join('')}
    `; fields.forEach(f=>{ const s=$('gsvm-'+f.k); if(s) s.value=GS.villaMap[f.k]??-1; }); } function _gsVillaPreview(){ const m=GS.villaMap, rows=GS.rows.slice(0,5); const cols=['code','name','status','phase','zone','start','end','budget','pm']; const hdrs=['Code','Name','Status','Phase','Zone','Start','End','Budget','PM']; const el=$('gs-villa-preview'); if(!el) return; el.innerHTML=`
    Preview (first ${rows.length} rows)
    ${hdrs.map(h=>``).join('')}${rows.map(r=>`${cols.map(k=>{const i=m[k];return``;}).join('')}`).join('')}
    ${h}
    ${i>=0?(r[i]??'-'):'-'}
    `; } function _gsImportVillas(){ const m=GS.villaMap; if(!m||m.code<0||m.name<0){ toast('Map at least Code and Name columns','error'); return; } const projs=Store.getProjects(); const statusMap={'on track':'on-track','at risk':'at-risk','not started':'not-started','in progress':'in-progress','delayed':'delayed','completed':'completed'}; let updated=0,added=0; GS.rows.forEach(row=>{ const code=(row[m.code]||'').trim(); const name=(row[m.name]||'').trim(); if(!code&&!name) return; let pid=Object.keys(projs).find(k=>projs[k].code===code||(code&&projs[k].id===code)||projs[k].name===name); const rawStatus=(m.status>=0?row[m.status]||'':'').toLowerCase().trim(); const status=statusMap[rawStatus]||rawStatus||'not-started'; const proj=pid?{...projs[pid]}:{id:code||('P'+String(Date.now()).slice(-5)),type:'villa',dev:'Amanvana'}; if(code) proj.code=code; if(name) proj.name=name; if(status) proj.status=status; if(m.phase>=0&&row[m.phase]) proj.phase=(row[m.phase]||'').trim(); if(m.zone>=0&&row[m.zone]) proj.zone=(row[m.zone]||'').trim(); if(m.start>=0&&row[m.start]) { proj.start=_parseMSDate(row[m.start]); proj.plannedStart=proj.start; } if(m.end>=0&&row[m.end]) { proj.end=_parseMSDate(row[m.end]); proj.plannedEnd=proj.end; } if(m.budget>=0&&row[m.budget]) proj.budget=parseInt(String(row[m.budget]).replace(/[^0-9]/g,''))||proj.budget||0; if(m.pm>=0&&row[m.pm]) proj.pm=(row[m.pm]||'').trim(); if(m.contractor>=0&&row[m.contractor]) proj.contractorName=(row[m.contractor]||'').trim(); if(m.area>=0&&row[m.area]) proj.area=parseInt(String(row[m.area]).replace(/[^0-9]/g,''))||proj.area||0; if(m.notes>=0&&row[m.notes]) proj.notes=(row[m.notes]||'').trim(); if(pid){ projs[pid]=proj; updated++; } else { projs[proj.id]=proj; added++; } }); Store.saveProjects(projs); _refreshViews({sb:true}); toast(`Import done: ${updated} villa${updated!==1?'s':''} updated, ${added} added`,'success'); closeMod('importMod'); } // ── TASK COLUMN MAPPER ─────────────────────────────────────── function _gsRenderTaskMapper(){ const h=GS.headers; GS.taskMap = { name: _guessCol(h,['name','task','activity','description','task name']), phase: _guessCol(h,['phase','wbs1','outline1','area','section','work package']), subphase: _guessCol(h,['subphase','sub','room','wbs2','outline2','sub-phase','subarea']), status: _guessCol(h,['status','state']), start: _guessCol(h,['start','begin','start date']), end: _guessCol(h,['end','finish','due','finish date','end date']), duration: _guessCol(h,['duration','dur','days']), progress: _guessCol(h,['%','pct','progress','complete','done','% complete','completion']), assignee: _guessCol(h,['resource','assign','person','team','responsible','owner']), priority: _guessCol(h,['priority','prio','critical']), notes: _guessCol(h,['notes','remarks','comment']), baseline_start: _guessCol(h,['baseline start','baselinestart','blstart','bl start']), baseline_end: _guessCol(h,['baseline finish','baselinefinish','blend','bl end']), }; const opts=['',...h.map((hd,i)=>``)].join(''); const projs=Store.getProjects(); const villaOpts=Object.values(projs) .filter(p=>!['landscape','waterbody','development','phase-summary'].includes(p.type)) .sort((a,b)=>a.id.localeCompare(b.id)) .map(p=>``).join(''); const fields=[ {k:'name', lbl:'Task Name', req:true}, {k:'phase', lbl:'Phase / WBS Level 1',req:false}, {k:'subphase', lbl:'Sub-Phase / Level 2',req:false}, {k:'status', lbl:'Status', req:false}, {k:'start', lbl:'Start Date', req:false}, {k:'end', lbl:'Finish Date', req:false}, {k:'duration', lbl:'Duration (days)', req:false}, {k:'progress', lbl:'Progress %', req:false}, {k:'assignee', lbl:'Assignee / Resource', req:false}, {k:'priority', lbl:'Priority', req:false}, {k:'notes', lbl:'Notes', req:false}, {k:'baseline_start',lbl:'Baseline Start', req:false}, {k:'baseline_end', lbl:'Baseline End', req:false}, ]; const mapper=$('gs-mapper'); if(!mapper) return; mapper.innerHTML=`
    Map columns - ${GS.rows.length} task rows detected. Select the target villa, then map columns.
    ${fields.map(f=>`
    `).join('')}
    `; fields.forEach(f=>{ const s=$('gstm-'+f.k); if(s) s.value=GS.taskMap[f.k]??-1; }); // Pre-select villa if opened from Planner if(GS._preselectedPid){ const vEl=$('gs-task-villa'); if(vEl) vEl.value=GS._preselectedPid; GS._preselectedPid=null; } } function _gsTaskPreview(){ const m=GS.taskMap, rows=GS.rows.slice(0,5); const cols=['name','phase','subphase','start','end','duration','progress','assignee']; const hdrs=['Task Name','Phase','Sub-Phase','Start','End','Dur','%','Assignee']; const el=$('gs-task-preview'); if(!el) return; el.innerHTML=`
    Preview (first ${rows.length} rows)
    ${hdrs.map(h=>``).join('')}${rows.map(r=>`${cols.map(k=>{const i=m[k];return``;}).join('')}`).join('')}
    ${h}
    ${i>=0?(r[i]??'-'):'-'}
    `; } function _gsImportTasks(){ const m=GS.taskMap; if(!m||m.name<0){ toast('Map at least the Task Name column','error'); return; } const pidEl=$('gs-task-villa'); const pid=pidEl?pidEl.value:''; if(!pid){ toast('Select a target villa / project','error'); return; } const projs=Store.getProjects(); if(!projs[pid]){ toast('Project not found: '+pid,'error'); return; } const statusMap={'not started':'not-started','in progress':'in-progress','on track':'on-track','at risk':'at-risk','delayed':'delayed','completed':'completed','done':'completed','blocked':'blocked'}; const newTasks=[]; let order=1; const phaseGroups={}; GS.rows.forEach(row=>{ const tname=(row[m.name]||'').trim(); if(!tname) return; const ph=(m.phase>=0?row[m.phase]||'':'').trim()||'General'; const sp=(m.subphase>=0?row[m.subphase]||'':'').trim()||''; if(!phaseGroups[ph]) phaseGroups[ph]={}; const spKey=sp||'__root__'; if(!phaseGroups[ph][spKey]) phaseGroups[ph][spKey]=[]; phaseGroups[ph][spKey].push(row); }); Object.entries(phaseGroups).forEach(([ph,subs])=>{ Object.entries(subs).forEach(([sp,rows])=>{ rows.forEach(row=>{ const tname=(row[m.name]||'').trim(); const rawStatus=(m.status>=0?row[m.status]||'':'').toLowerCase().trim(); const status=statusMap[rawStatus]||rawStatus||'not-started'; newTasks.push({ id:'UPTSK_'+Date.now()+'_'+(Math.random()*10000|0), villa_id:pid, phase:ph, subPhase:sp==='__root__'?'':sp, name:tname, status, progress:m.progress>=0?_parsePct(row[m.progress]):0, planned_start:m.start>=0?_parseMSDate(row[m.start]):'', planned_end:m.end>=0?_parseMSDate(row[m.end]):'', actual_start:'', actual_end:'', duration:m.duration>=0?_parseDuration(row[m.duration]):1, assignee:m.assignee>=0?(row[m.assignee]||'').trim():'', priority:['low','medium','high','critical'].includes((m.priority>=0?(row[m.priority]||'').toLowerCase().trim():''))? (m.priority>=0?(row[m.priority]||'').toLowerCase().trim():'medium'):'medium', notes:m.notes>=0?(row[m.notes]||'').trim():'', baseline_start:m.baseline_start>=0?_parseMSDate(row[m.baseline_start]):'', baseline_end:m.baseline_end>=0?_parseMSDate(row[m.baseline_end]):'', display_order:order++, source:'upload', }); }); }); }); if(!newTasks.length){ toast('No task rows found in the file','error'); return; } const allTasks=Store.getAllTasks(); const existingTasks=allTasks[pid]||[]; const kept=existingTasks.filter(t=>t.source!=='upload'&&t.source!=='gsheets'); allTasks[pid]=[...kept,...newTasks]; Store.saveTasksMap(allTasks); // Auto-update project status if tasks have progress const progVals=newTasks.map(t=>t.progress).filter(p=>p>0); if(progVals.length&&projs[pid]&&projs[pid].status==='not-started'){ projs[pid].status='in-progress'; Store.saveProjects(projs); } _refreshViews({sb:true}); toast(`Import done: ${newTasks.length} task${newTasks.length!==1?'s':''} imported for ${projs[pid]?.name||pid}`,'success'); closeMod('importMod'); } /** * Open the upload import modal pre-set to Task Schedule for the current villa. * Called from the Planner toolbar. */ function openGsImportForVilla(){ openMod('importMod'); IMP.tab='gsheets'; renderImportMod(); setTimeout(function(){ const r=document.querySelector('input[name="gs-type-radio"][value="tasks"]'); if(r){ r.checked=true; GS.type='tasks'; } GS._preselectedPid=S.proj?.id||null; },80); } // ============================================================ // WHITE LOTUS MASTER SCHEDULE IMPORTER // ============================================================ const WLMS = { data: null, file: null, depData: null }; // Contractor / Block / Zone metadata per villa (from Master Schedule header) const WLMS_VILLA_META = { V32:{block:'Block 10',zone:'Zone 2',contractor:'C1 - Charge Infra'}, V33:{block:'Block 10',zone:'Zone 2',contractor:'C1 - Charge Infra'}, V34:{block:'Block 10',zone:'Zone 2',contractor:'C1 - Charge Infra'}, V35:{block:'Block 10',zone:'Zone 2',contractor:'C1 - Charge Infra'}, V36:{block:'Block 10',zone:'Zone 2',contractor:'C1 - Charge Infra'}, V37:{block:'Block 10',zone:'Zone 2',contractor:'C1 - Charge Infra'}, V47:{block:'Block 14',zone:'Zone 2',contractor:'C1 - Charge Infra'}, V48:{block:'Block 14',zone:'Zone 2',contractor:'C1 - Charge Infra'}, V49:{block:'Block 14',zone:'Zone 2',contractor:'C1 - Charge Infra'}, V50:{block:'Block 14',zone:'Zone 2',contractor:'C1 - Charge Infra'}, V12:{block:'Block 4',zone:'Zone 1',contractor:'C2 - A&T / Abraham Thomas'}, V13:{block:'Block 4',zone:'Zone 1',contractor:'C2 - A&T / Abraham Thomas'}, V14:{block:'Block 4',zone:'Zone 1',contractor:'C2 - A&T / Abraham Thomas'}, V25:{block:'Block 9',zone:'Zone 1',contractor:'C2 - A&T / Abraham Thomas'}, V26:{block:'Block 9',zone:'Zone 1',contractor:'C2 - A&T / Abraham Thomas'}, V27:{block:'Block 9',zone:'Zone 1',contractor:'C2 - A&T / Abraham Thomas'}, V28:{block:'Block 9',zone:'Zone 1',contractor:'C2 - A&T / Abraham Thomas'}, V29:{block:'Block 9',zone:'Zone 1',contractor:'C2 - A&T / Abraham Thomas'}, V30:{block:'Block 9',zone:'Zone 1',contractor:'C2 - A&T / Abraham Thomas'}, V31:{block:'Block 9',zone:'Zone 1',contractor:'C2 - A&T / Abraham Thomas'}, V15:{block:'Block 5',zone:'Zone 1',contractor:'C2 - A&T / Abraham Thomas'}, V16:{block:'Block 5',zone:'Zone 1',contractor:'C2 - A&T / Abraham Thomas'}, V65:{block:'Block 20',zone:'Zone 3',contractor:'C3 - TBD Contractor'}, V66:{block:'Block 20',zone:'Zone 3',contractor:'C3 - TBD Contractor'}, V67:{block:'Block 20',zone:'Zone 3',contractor:'C3 - TBD Contractor'}, V51:{block:'Block 15',zone:'Zone 3',contractor:'C3 - TBD Contractor'}, V52:{block:'Block 15',zone:'Zone 3',contractor:'C3 - TBD Contractor'}, V53:{block:'Block 15',zone:'Zone 3',contractor:'C3 - TBD Contractor'}, V54:{block:'Block 16',zone:'Zone 3',contractor:'C3 - TBD Contractor'}, V55:{block:'Block 16',zone:'Zone 3',contractor:'C3 - TBD Contractor'}, V56:{block:'Block 16',zone:'Zone 3',contractor:'C3 - TBD Contractor'}, V57:{block:'Block 17',zone:'Zone 3',contractor:'C3 - TBD Contractor'}, V58:{block:'Block 17',zone:'Zone 3',contractor:'C3 - TBD Contractor'}, V59:{block:'Block 17',zone:'Zone 3',contractor:'C3 - TBD Contractor'} }; function wlmsHandleDrop(e){ const file = e.dataTransfer && e.dataTransfer.files && e.dataTransfer.files[0]; if(file) wlmsHandleFile(file); } function wlmsHandleDepDrop(e){ const file = e.dataTransfer && e.dataTransfer.files && e.dataTransfer.files[0]; if(file) wlmsHandleDepFile(file); } function wlmsHandleDepFile(file){ if(!file) return; $('wlms-dep-status').textContent = '⏳ Reading dependency mapping...'; const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = function(e){ try{ WLMS.depData = _wlmsParseDep(e.target.result); const n = WLMS.depData.length; $('wlms-dep-label').textContent = '✅ ' + file.name; $('wlms-dep-status').innerHTML = `Loaded ${n} activities - WBS codes, predecessors & notes will be added to each task`; }catch(err){ $('wlms-dep-status').innerHTML = '❌ ' + err.message + ''; } }; reader.readAsText(file); } function _wlmsParseDep(text){ // _parseCSV returns {headers, rows} - combine into a flat array const parsed = _parseCSV(text); const allRows = (parsed && parsed.headers) ? [parsed.headers, ...(parsed.rows || [])] : []; const acts = []; for(const row of allRows){ if(!row || !row[0]) continue; const id = parseInt(row[0]); if(isNaN(id)) continue; acts.push({ id, wbs: (row[1]||'').trim(), name: (row[2]||'').trim(), dur: (row[3]||'').trim(), pred: (row[4]||'').trim(), dep_type: (row[6]||'').trim(), lag: (row[7]||'').trim(), notes: (row[8]||'').trim() }); } if(!acts.length) throw new Error('No activity rows found in dependency mapping'); return acts; } // Normalize name for fuzzy matching: lowercase, strip symbols, first 5 words function _wlmsNorm(name){ return name.toLowerCase() .replace(/[-–★⚠◆✓\(\)\[\]★]/g,'') .replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim() .split(' ').slice(0,5).join(' '); } // Build a lookup from dep data: norm(name) -> dep entry function _wlmsDepLookup(depData){ const map = {}; for(const d of depData){ const key = _wlmsNorm(d.name); if(key) map[key] = d; // Also index by first 3 words for fuzzy fall-back const short = key.split(' ').slice(0,3).join(' '); if(short && !map[short]) map[short] = d; } return map; } function _wlmsFindDep(actName, depLookup){ const key = _wlmsNorm(actName); if(depLookup[key]) return depLookup[key]; // 4-word match const k4 = key.split(' ').slice(0,4).join(' '); if(depLookup[k4]) return depLookup[k4]; // 3-word match const k3 = key.split(' ').slice(0,3).join(' '); if(depLookup[k3]) return depLookup[k3]; return null; } function wlmsHandleFile(file){ if(!file) return; WLMS.file = file; WLMS.data = null; $('wlms-status').textContent = '⏳ Reading file...'; $('wlms-preview').style.display = 'none'; $('wlms-import-btn').style.display = 'none'; const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = function(e){ try{ const text = e.target.result; WLMS.data = _wlmsParseCSV(text); _wlmsShowPreview(WLMS.data); }catch(err){ $('wlms-status').innerHTML = '❌ ' + err.message + ''; console.error(err); } }; reader.onerror = function(){ $('wlms-status').textContent = '❌ Failed to read file'; }; reader.readAsText(file); } function _wlmsParseDate(s){ if(!s) return null; s = s.trim(); // DD-Mon-YY or DD-Mon-YYYY const m = s.match(/^(\d{1,2})-([A-Za-z]{3})-(\d{2,4})$/); if(m){ const months={jan:'01',feb:'02',mar:'03',apr:'04',may:'05',jun:'06',jul:'07',aug:'08',sep:'09',oct:'10',nov:'11',dec:'12'}; const mo = months[m[2].toLowerCase()]; if(!mo) return null; let yr = parseInt(m[3]); if(yr < 100) yr += (yr < 50 ? 2000 : 1900); return `${yr}-${mo}-${String(m[1]).padStart(2,'0')}`; } // ISO passthrough if(/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(s)) return s; return null; } // Proper RFC 4180 CSV parser - handles multi-line quoted cells correctly // (the built-in _parseCSV splits by newline first, which breaks villa name cells) function _wlmsRFC4180(text){ text = text.replace(/\r\n/g,'\n').replace(/\r/g,'\n'); const rows = []; let row=[], cur='', inQ=false; for(let i=0;ix.trim())) rows.push(row); row=[]; } else cur+=c; } } if(cur||row.length){ row.push(cur); if(row.some(x=>x.trim())) rows.push(row); } return rows; } function _wlmsParseCSV(text){ const allRows = _wlmsRFC4180(text); if(!allRows.length) throw new Error('File appears empty - check the CSV file'); // Find the "Activity" header row (col 0 === 'Activity') let headerRowIdx = -1; for(let i=0;i villaName for(let ri=0;ri 0){ activities.push({phase:currentPhase, name:actName, cat, villaDates}); } } if(!activities.length) throw new Error('No activity rows found - check file format'); // Unique villas sorted numerically const villaSet = new Set(); activities.forEach(a => Object.keys(a.villaDates).forEach(v => villaSet.add(v))); const villas = [...villaSet].sort((a,b) => parseInt(a.slice(1))-parseInt(b.slice(1))); return {villas, handover, activities}; } function _wlmsShowPreview(data){ const {villas, handover, activities} = data; const phases = [...new Set(activities.map(a=>a.phase).filter(Boolean))]; // Date range let minDate='9999-99', maxDate='0000-00'; for(const a of activities){ for(const d of Object.values(a.villaDates)){ if(d.start && d.start < minDate) minDate = d.start; if(d.end && d.end > maxDate) maxDate = d.end; } } const fmtD = d => { if(!d||d.startsWith('9999')||d.startsWith('0000')) return '-'; const [y,m,dd] = d.split('-'); const mo=['Jan','Feb','Mar','Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec'][parseInt(m)-1]; return `${parseInt(dd)} ${mo} ${y}`; }; $('wlms-status').textContent = ''; const prev = $('wlms-preview'); prev.style.display = ''; prev.innerHTML = `
    ✅ File parsed successfully - ${WLMS.file.name}
    ${villas.length}
    Villas
    ${activities.length}
    Activities / Tasks
    ${phases.length}
    Phases
    Timeline: ${fmtD(minDate)} → ${fmtD(maxDate)}
    Villas: ${villas.join(' · ')}
    Phases: ${phases.map(p=>p.replace(/[★⚠◆]/g,'').trim()).join(' · ')}
    What will be imported:
    • ${villas.length} villa projects - one per villa, with block, zone, contractor and handover date
    • ${activities.length} tasks per villa - organized by construction phase with start and end dates from the schedule
    • If a villa project already exists (same code), it will be updated - not duplicated
    `; // Reveal optional dep mapping upload $('wlms-dep-section').style.display = ''; // ── Import scope selector ──────────────────────────────────────────────── const cats = [...new Set(activities.map(a=>a.cat).filter(Boolean))]; prev.innerHTML += `
    Import Scope
    `; WLMS.mode = 'full'; $('wlms-import-btn').style.display = ''; $('wlms-import-btn').textContent = `⬇ Full Import (${villas.length} villas)`; } function wlmsDoImport(){ if(!WLMS.data){ toast('No data loaded - upload the Master Schedule CSV first','error'); return; } const {villas, handover, activities} = WLMS.data; // Build dep lookup if dep data is available const depLookup = WLMS.depData ? _wlmsDepLookup(WLMS.depData) : null; let depMatched = 0; const projs = Store.getProjects(); const allTasks = Store.getAllTasks(); let projCreated=0, projUpdated=0, taskCount=0; for(const villa of villas){ const meta = WLMS_VILLA_META[villa] || {}; const pid = 'wl-' + villa.toLowerCase(); // Earliest task start for this villa = project start let projStart = null; for(const act of activities){ const d = act.villaDates[villa]; if(d && d.start && (!projStart || d.start < projStart)) projStart = d.start; } const projEnd = handover[villa] || null; const projName = `Villa ${villa} - ${meta.block||''}`.trim().replace(/\s*-\s*$/,''); const projNotes = `Zone: ${meta.zone||''}\nBlock: ${meta.block||''}\nContractor: ${meta.contractor||''}\nHandover Target: ${handover[villa]||''}`; if(projs[pid]){ Object.assign(projs[pid], { name: projName, start: projStart || projs[pid].start, end: projEnd || projs[pid].end, ss: meta.contractor || projs[pid].ss || '', notes: projNotes }); projUpdated++; } else { const _importDev=(_currentDev&&_currentDev!=='ALL')?_currentDev:'Amanvana'; projs[pid] = { id: pid, name: projName, code: villa, dev: _importDev, status:'not-started', type: 'Residential Villa', start: projStart || '', end: projEnd || '', pm: '', ss: meta.contractor || '', budget:0, area: 0, notes: projNotes }; projCreated++; } // Build tasks for this villa const villaTasks = []; let tidx = 1; for(const act of activities){ const d = act.villaDates[villa]; if(!d) continue; let dur = 0; if(d.start && d.end){ dur = Math.max(1, Math.round((new Date(d.end)-new Date(d.start))/86400000)+1); } // Enrich from dependency mapping if available let wbs='', pred='', taskNotes=''; if(depLookup){ const dep = _wlmsFindDep(act.name, depLookup); if(dep){ wbs = dep.wbs || ''; pred = dep.pred || ''; taskNotes = dep.notes || ''; if(dep.dur && !dur) dur = parseInt(dep.dur)||0; depMatched++; } } villaTasks.push({ id: `${pid}-t${tidx++}`, name: act.name, phase: act.phase || '', sub: act.cat || '', wbs, pred, start: d.start || '', end: d.end || '', dur, pct: 0, owner: '', notes: taskNotes, status: 'pending', source: 'wl-master-schedule' }); taskCount++; } allTasks[pid] = villaTasks; } Store.saveProjects(projs); Store.saveTasksMap(allTasks); closeMod('importMod'); _refreshViews({sb:true}); const depMsg = depLookup ? ` · ${depMatched} tasks enriched with WBS/dep data` : ''; toast(`✅ ${projCreated} villas created + ${projUpdated} updated - ${taskCount.toLocaleString()} tasks imported${depMsg}`, 'success'); } // ── WLMS import mode switch ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── function _wlmsSetMode(mode){ WLMS.mode = mode; // Update button styles ['full','phase','villa'].forEach(m=>{ const b=$('wlms-mode-'+m); if(!b) return; const on = m===mode; b.style.background = on?'var(--accent)':'var(--surface2)'; b.style.color = on?'#fff':'var(--text)'; b.style.borderColor = on?'var(--accent)':'var(--border)'; }); const cfg=$('wlms-mode-config'); if(!cfg||!WLMS.data) return; const {villas,activities} = WLMS.data; const cats = [...new Set(activities.map(a=>a.cat).filter(Boolean))]; if(mode==='full'){ cfg.innerHTML=''; $('wlms-import-btn').style.display=''; } else { $('wlms-import-btn').style.display='none'; if(mode==='phase') _wlmsRenderPhaseConfig(cats,villas); else _wlmsRenderVillaConfig(villas); } } // ── By Phase config ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function _wlmsRenderPhaseConfig(cats,villas){ const cfg=$('wlms-mode-config'); if(!cfg) return; const phChks = cats.map(c=>` `).join(''); const vlChks = villas.map(v=>` `).join(''); cfg.innerHTML=`
    Phases / Categories All None
    ${phChks}
    Villas All None
    ${vlChks}
    `; _wlmsUpdatePhaseCount(); } function _wlmsToggleAll(sel,check){ document.querySelectorAll(sel).forEach(c=>{ c.checked=check; }); _wlmsUpdatePhaseCount(); } function _wlmsUpdatePhaseCount(){ if(!WLMS.data) return; const phases = new Set([...document.querySelectorAll('.wlms-phase-chk:checked')].map(c=>c.value)); const villaCnt = document.querySelectorAll('.wlms-villa-chk:checked').length; const taskCnt = WLMS.data.activities.filter(a=>phases.has(a.cat)).length; const el=$('wlms-phase-count'); if(el) el.textContent = phases.size ? `${taskCnt} task${taskCnt!==1?'s':''} × ${villaCnt} villa${villaCnt!==1?'s':''} = ${taskCnt*villaCnt} total rows` : 'Select at least one phase'; } // ── By Villa config ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function _wlmsRenderVillaConfig(villas){ const cfg=$('wlms-mode-config'); if(!cfg) return; const opts = villas.map(v=>``).join(''); cfg.innerHTML=`
    `; } function _wlmsVillaSelChanged(){ const villa = ($('wlms-villa-sel')||{}).value; if(!villa||!WLMS.data) return; const {activities,handover} = WLMS.data; const acts = activities.filter(a=>a.villaDates[villa] && (a.villaDates[villa].start||a.villaDates[villa].end)); const cats = [...new Set(acts.map(a=>a.cat).filter(Boolean))]; const projs = Store.getProjects(); const exists = !!projs['wl-'+villa.toLowerCase()]; let minD='9999-99', maxD='0000-00'; acts.forEach(a=>{ const d=a.villaDates[villa]; if(d.start&&d.startmaxD) maxD=d.end; }); const fmtD = d=>{ if(!d||d.startsWith('9999')||d.startsWith('0000')) return '?'; const [y,m,dd]=d.split('-'); return `${parseInt(dd)} ${['Jan','Feb','Mar','Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec'][parseInt(m)-1]} ${y}`; }; $('wlms-villa-info').innerHTML=`
    ${acts.length} tasks · ${cats.length} phases (${cats.join(', ')})
    Timeline: ${fmtD(minD)} → ${fmtD(maxD)}
    ${handover[villa]?`
    Handover target: ${fmtD(handover[villa])}
    `:''}
    ${exists ?`✓ Project exists — tasks will be replaced` :`⊕ New project will be created`}
    `; } // ── Phase import executor ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── function _wlmsDoPhaseImport(){ if(!WLMS.data){ toast('No data loaded','error'); return; } const phases = new Set([...document.querySelectorAll('.wlms-phase-chk:checked')].map(c=>c.value)); const villas = [...document.querySelectorAll('.wlms-villa-chk:checked')].map(c=>c.value); if(!phases.size){ toast('Select at least one phase','error'); return; } if(!villas.length){ toast('Select at least one villa','error'); return; } const {activities,handover} = WLMS.data; const depLookup = WLMS.depData ? _wlmsDepLookup(WLMS.depData) : null; const filteredActs = activities.filter(a=>phases.has(a.cat)); const projs = Store.getProjects(); const allTasks = Store.getAllTasks(); let taskCount=0; for(const villa of villas){ const pid = 'wl-'+villa.toLowerCase(); // Create project stub if missing if(!projs[pid]){ const meta = WLMS_VILLA_META[villa]||{}; const _importDev=(_currentDev&&_currentDev!=='ALL')?_currentDev:'Amanvana'; let ps=null; filteredActs.forEach(a=>{ const d=a.villaDates[villa]; if(d&&d.start&&(!ps||d.start!phases.has(t.sub)); const seq0 = kept.length; const newTasks = []; filteredActs.forEach((act,i)=>{ const d=act.villaDates[villa]; if(!d||(!d.start&&!d.end)) return; newTasks.push(_wlmsBuildVillaTask(pid,villa,act,d,depLookup,seq0+i+1)); }); allTasks[pid] = [...kept, ...newTasks]; taskCount += newTasks.length; } Store.saveProjects(projs); Store.saveTasksMap(allTasks); _refreshViews({sb:true}); toast(`Phase import done — ${taskCount} tasks across ${villas.length} villa${villas.length!==1?'s':''}`, 'success'); closeMod('importMod'); } // ── Villa import executor ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── function _wlmsDoVillaImport(){ if(!WLMS.data){ toast('No data loaded','error'); return; } const villa = ($('wlms-villa-sel')||{}).value; if(!villa){ toast('Select a villa first','error'); return; } const {activities,handover} = WLMS.data; const meta = WLMS_VILLA_META[villa]||{}; const pid = 'wl-'+villa.toLowerCase(); const depLookup = WLMS.depData ? _wlmsDepLookup(WLMS.depData) : null; const projs = Store.getProjects(); const allTasks = Store.getAllTasks(); // Compute project start from earliest task let ps=null; activities.forEach(a=>{ const d=a.villaDates[villa]; if(d&&d.start&&(!ps||d.start{ const d=act.villaDates[villa]; if(!d||(!d.start&&!d.end)) return; tasks.push(_wlmsBuildVillaTask(pid,villa,act,d,depLookup,seq++)); }); allTasks[pid]=tasks; Store.saveProjects(projs); Store.saveTasksMap(allTasks); _refreshViews({sb:true}); toast(`Imported ${tasks.length} tasks for ${villa}`, 'success'); closeMod('importMod'); } // ── Shared task builder (used by all 3 import modes) ───────────────────────── function _wlmsBuildVillaTask(pid,villa,act,dates,depLookup,seq){ let dur=0, wbs='', pred='', taskNotes=''; if(dates.start&&dates.end) dur=Math.max(1,Math.round((new Date(dates.end)-new Date(dates.start))/86400000)+1); if(depLookup){ const dep=_wlmsFindDep(act.name,depLookup); if(dep){ wbs=dep.wbs||''; pred=dep.pred||''; taskNotes=dep.notes||''; if(dep.dur&&!dur) dur=parseInt(dep.dur)||0; } } return { id:`${pid}-t${seq}`, name:act.name, phase:act.phase||'', sub:act.cat||'', wbs, pred, start:dates.start||'', end:dates.end||'', dur, pct:0, owner:'', notes:taskNotes, status:'pending', source:'wl-master-schedule' }; } // ============================================================ // EXPORT / IMPORT / PRINT // ============================================================ function exportAll(){ if(_serverOK&&CKY_API){window.open(CKY_API+'/api/export','_blank');return;} const data={projects:Store.getProjects(),tasks:Store.getAllTasks(),resources:Store.getResources(),exportedAt:new Date().toISOString(),version:'2.1'}; const blob=new Blob([JSON.stringify(data,null,2)],{type:'application/json'}); const a=document.createElement('a');a.href=URL.createObjectURL(blob);a.download='wlg-export.json';a.click(); } function importAll(){ openMod('importMod'); renderImportMod(); } function toggleExportDrop(e){ e.stopPropagation(); const d=$('exportDrop'); if(!d)return; const open=d.style.display==='block'; d.style.display=open?'none':'block'; if(!open){ const close=function(ev){if(!$('exportDropWrap').contains(ev.target)){closeExportDrop();document.removeEventListener('click',close);}}; document.addEventListener('click',close); } } function closeExportDrop(){const d=$('exportDrop');if(d)d.style.display='none';} function _exportRangeCSV(fromDate,toDate,label){ const fmt2=function(d){if(!d)return'';const p=d.split('-');return p[2]+'/'+p[1]+'/'+p[0];}; const projs=Store.getProjects(); const tasksAll=Store.getAllTasks(); const rows=[['Task Name','Phase','Sub-Phase','Villa Code','Villa Name','Status','Progress','Planned Start','Planned Finish','Assignee']]; Object.values(projs).forEach(function(p){ if(p.type==='phase-summary')return; const ts=tasksAll[p.id]||[]; ts.forEach(function(t){ if(!t.startDate||!t.endDate)return; if(fromDate===toDate){if(t.startDate>fromDate||t.endDatetoDate||t.endDater.map(v=>`"${String(v).replace(/"/g,'""')}"`).join(',')).join('\n'); const blob=new Blob([csv],{type:'text/csv'}); const a=document.createElement('a'); a.href=URL.createObjectURL(blob); a.download='chanakya-task-import-template.csv'; a.click(); toast('Task import template downloaded','success'); } function _buildCanonicalTaskMap(headers){ const byNorm=new Map((headers||[]).map((h,i)=>[_normalizeImpHdr(h),i])); const need={ name:'taskname',phase:'phase',subphase:'subphase',start:'startdate',end:'finishdate',duration:'duration', progress:'progress',status:'status',priority:'priority',assignee:'assignee',notes:'notes', baseline_start:'baselinestart',baseline_end:'baselinefinish' }; const out={}; const missing=[]; Object.entries(need).forEach(([k,n])=>{ const idx=byNorm.has(n)?byNorm.get(n):-1; out[k]=idx; if(idx<0)missing.push(k); }); return {map:out,missing}; } function renderImportMod(){ IMP.villaRows=[]; IMP.taskRows=[]; IMP.tab='gsheets'; _renderImpTabs(); // Reset upload state when modal opens GS.headers=[]; GS.rows=[]; GS.workbook=null; // Reset WLMS state WLMS.data=null; WLMS.file=null; WLMS.depData=null; } function _renderImpTabs(){ const gActive = IMP.tab==='gsheets'; const wActive = IMP.tab==='wlms'; const vActive = IMP.tab==='villas'; const tActive = IMP.tab==='tasks'; const rActive = IMP.tab==='restore'; const gsBtn = $('imp-tab-gsheets'); if(gsBtn){ gsBtn.className='btn btn-sm '+(gActive?'btn-primary':'btn-ghost'); gsBtn.style.cssText=''; } const wBtn = $('imp-tab-wlms'); if(wBtn){ wBtn.className='btn btn-sm '+(wActive?'btn-primary':'btn-ghost'); wBtn.style.whiteSpace='nowrap'; } $('imp-tab-villas').className = 'btn btn-sm ' + (vActive?'btn-primary':'btn-ghost'); $('imp-tab-tasks').className = 'btn btn-sm ' + (tActive?'btn-primary':'btn-ghost'); $('imp-tab-restore').className = 'btn btn-sm ' + (rActive?'btn-primary':'btn-ghost'); $('imp-pane-gsheets').style.display = gActive?'':'none'; $('imp-pane-wlms').style.display = wActive?'':'none'; $('imp-pane-villas').style.display = vActive?'':'none'; $('imp-pane-tasks').style.display = tActive?'':'none'; $('imp-pane-restore').style.display = rActive?'':'none'; } function impSwitchTab(t){ IMP.tab=t; _renderImpTabs(); if(t==='gsheets') gsRenderSavedSheets(); } function restoreFromJSON(){ const inp = document.getElementById('restore-file-inp'); if(!inp||!inp.files||!inp.files[0]){ toast('No file selected','error'); return; } const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = function(e){ try{ const data = JSON.parse(e.target.result); if(!data||(!data.projects&&!data.projs)){ toast('Invalid backup file - no project data found','error'); return; } const projs = data.projects||data.projs||{}; const res = data.resources||{}; // Restore projects Object.assign(_C.projs, projs); // Restore resources if(Object.keys(res).length) Object.assign(_C.resources, res); // Restore tasks if(data.tasks){Store.saveTasksMap(data.tasks);} Store.flush(); closeMod('importMod'); _refreshViews({sb:true}); const pCount = Object.keys(projs).length; toast(`Backup restored - ${pCount} project${pCount!==1?'s':''} loaded`,'success'); }catch(err){ toast('Failed to parse backup file: '+err.message,'error'); } }; reader.readAsText(inp.files[0]); } function _parseCSV(text){ const lines = text.split(/\r?\n/).filter(l=>l.trim()); const rows = lines.map(line=>{ const cells=[]; let cur='', inQ=false; for(let i=0;ir.some(c=>c)) }; } // Smart column guesser for MS Project exports function _guessCol(headers, candidates){ const h = headers.map(x=>x.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g,'')); for(const c of candidates){ const idx = h.findIndex(x=>x.includes(c.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g,''))); if(idx>=0) return idx; } return -1; } function _parseMSDate(s){ if(!s||s.trim()===''||s==='NA'||s==='-') return ''; const str = String(s).trim(); // Already ISO if(/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(str)) return str; // DD/MM/YY or DD/MM/YYYY const dmy = str.match(/^(\d{1,2})[\/\-](\d{1,2})[\/\-](\d{2,4})$/); if(dmy){ const y = dmy[3].length===2 ? '20'+dmy[3] : dmy[3]; return `${y}-${String(dmy[2]).padStart(2,'0')}-${String(dmy[1]).padStart(2,'0')}`; } // DD Mon YYYY or Mon DD, YYYY try{ const d = new Date(str); if(!isNaN(d)) return d.toISOString().split('T')[0]; }catch(e){} return ''; } function _parseDuration(s){ if(!s) return 1; const str = String(s).replace(/[^0-9.]/g,''); return Math.max(1,Math.round(parseFloat(str)||1)); } function _parsePct(s){ if(!s) return 0; return Math.min(100,Math.max(0,parseInt(String(s).replace(/[^0-9]/g,''))||0)); } function _slugify(s){ return (s||'').trim().replace(/\s+/g,'_').replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/g,''); } // ─── VILLA IMPORT ──────────────────────────────────────────── function impVillaFile(inp){ const f = inp.files[0]; if(!f) return; const r = new FileReader(); r.onload = ev => { const { headers, rows } = _parseCSV(ev.target.result); IMP.villaRows = rows; IMP.villaHeaders = headers; // Auto-detect columns IMP.villaMap = { code: _guessCol(headers,['code','wl-v','id','proj']), name: _guessCol(headers,['name','villa','title']), status: _guessCol(headers,['status','state']), phase: _guessCol(headers,['phase','block','section']), start: _guessCol(headers,['start','begin','commencement']), end: _guessCol(headers,['end','finish','completion','handover']), budget: _guessCol(headers,['budget','cost','amount','value']), pm: _guessCol(headers,['pm','manager','responsible']), notes: _guessCol(headers,['notes','remarks','comment']), }; _renderVillaMapper(); }; r.readAsText(f); } function _renderVillaMapper(){ const h = IMP.villaHeaders||[]; const opts = ['', ...h.map((hd,i)=>``) ].join(''); const fields = [ {k:'code', lbl:'Villa Code', req:true}, {k:'name', lbl:'Villa Name', req:true}, {k:'status',lbl:'Status', req:false}, {k:'phase', lbl:'Phase', req:false}, {k:'start', lbl:'Start Date', req:false}, {k:'end', lbl:'End / Handover', req:false}, {k:'budget',lbl:'Budget (₹)', req:false}, {k:'pm', lbl:'Project Manager', req:false}, {k:'notes', lbl:'Notes', req:false}, ]; $('imp-villa-mapper').innerHTML = `
    Map columns from your CSV (${IMP.villaRows.length} rows detected)
    ${fields.map(f=>`
    `).join('')}
    `; // Set detected values fields.forEach(f=>{ const sel = document.getElementById('vmap-'+f.k); if(sel) sel.value = IMP.villaMap[f.k]??-1; }); } function _villaPreview(){ const m=IMP.villaMap; const rows=IMP.villaRows.slice(0,5); const g=v=>v>=0?rows[0]?.[v]??'-':'-'; $('imp-villa-preview').innerHTML=`
    Preview (first 5 rows)
    ${['Code','Name','Status','Phase','Start','End','Budget','PM'].map(h=>``).join('')}${rows.map(r=>`${[m.code,m.name,m.status,m.phase,m.start,m.end,m.budget,m.pm].map(i=>``).join('')}`).join('')}
    ${h}
    ${i>=0?r[i]??'-':'-'}
    `; } function _importVillas(){ const m=IMP.villaMap; if(m.code<0||m.name<0){ toast('Map at least Code and Name','error'); return; } const projs=Store.getProjects(); const statusMap={'on track':'on-track','at risk':'at-risk','not started':'not-started','in progress':'in-progress','delayed':'delayed','completed':'completed'}; let updated=0, added=0; IMP.villaRows.forEach(row=>{ const code=(row[m.code]||'').trim(); const name=(row[m.name]||'').trim(); if(!code&&!name) return; // Find existing by code or name let pid = Object.keys(projs).find(k=>projs[k].code===code||projs[k].name===name); const rawStatus = (m.status>=0?row[m.status]:'').toLowerCase().trim(); const status = statusMap[rawStatus]||rawStatus||'not-started'; const proj = pid ? {...projs[pid]} : {id:'P'+String(Date.now()).slice(-5),type:'villa',dev:'Amanvana'}; if(code) proj.code=code; if(name) proj.name=name; if(status) proj.status=status; if(m.phase>=0&&row[m.phase]) proj.phase=(row[m.phase]||'').trim(); if(m.start>=0&&row[m.start]) proj.start=_parseMSDate(row[m.start]); if(m.end>=0&&row[m.end]) proj.end=_parseMSDate(row[m.end]); if(m.budget>=0&&row[m.budget]) proj.budget=parseInt(String(row[m.budget]).replace(/[^0-9]/g,''))||proj.budget||0; if(m.pm>=0&&row[m.pm]) proj.pm=(row[m.pm]||'').trim(); if(m.notes>=0&&row[m.notes]) proj.notes=(row[m.notes]||'').trim(); if(pid){ projs[pid]=proj; updated++; } else { projs[proj.id]=proj; added++; } }); Store.saveProjects(projs); _refreshViews({sb:true}); toast(`${updated} villas updated, ${added} added`,'success'); closeMod('importMod'); } // ─── TASK IMPORT ──────────────────────────────────────────── function impTaskFile(inp){ const f=inp.files[0]; if(!f) return; const r=new FileReader(); r.onload=ev=>{ const {headers,rows}=_parseCSV(ev.target.result); const canon=_buildCanonicalTaskMap(headers); if(canon.missing.length){ const pretty={name:'Task Name',phase:'Phase',subphase:'Sub-Phase',start:'Start Date',end:'Finish Date',duration:'Duration',progress:'Progress %',status:'Status',priority:'Priority',assignee:'Assignee',notes:'Notes',baseline_start:'Baseline Start',baseline_end:'Baseline Finish'}; const miss=canon.missing.map(k=>pretty[k]||k).join(', '); IMP.taskRows=[]; IMP.taskHeaders=[]; IMP.taskMap={}; IMP.targetPid=null; $('imp-task-mapper').innerHTML=''; toast(`Invalid task import format. Download and use canonical template. Missing: ${miss}`,'error'); return; } IMP.taskRows=rows; IMP.taskHeaders=headers; IMP.taskMap=canon.map; _renderTaskMapper(); }; r.readAsText(f); } function _renderTaskMapper(){ const projs=Store.getProjects(); const villaOpts=Object.values(projs).filter(p=>!['landscape','waterbody','development'].includes(p.type)) .sort((a,b)=>a.id.localeCompare(b.id)) .map(p=>``).join(''); const selected=IMP.targetPid||''; const canonCols=_canonicalTaskTemplate().headers.join(', '); $('imp-task-mapper').innerHTML=`
    Note: This will replace all existing tasks for the selected villa.
    ${IMP.taskRows.length} rows detected - template validated
    Locked columns: ${canonCols}
    `; const sel=$('imp-task-mapper').querySelector('select'); if(sel)sel.value=selected; } function _taskPreview(){ const m=IMP.taskMap; const rows=IMP.taskRows.slice(0,6); $('imp-task-preview').innerHTML=`
    Preview (first 6 rows)
    ${['Task Name','Phase','Sub-Phase','Status','Start','Finish','Dur','%'].map(h=>``).join('')}${rows.map(r=>`${[m.name,m.phase,m.subphase,m.status,m.start,m.end,m.duration,m.progress].map(i=>``).join('')}`).join('')}
    ${h}
    ${i>=0?r[i]??'-':'-'}
    `; } function _importTasks(){ const m=IMP.taskMap; if(!IMP.targetPid){ toast('Select a villa to import into','error'); return; } const required=['name','phase','subphase','start','end','duration','progress','status','priority','assignee','notes','baseline_start','baseline_end']; const missing=required.filter(k=>!m||typeof m[k]!=='number'||m[k]<0); if(missing.length){ toast('Use canonical task import template. Missing mapped columns: '+missing.join(', '),'error'); return; } const pid=IMP.targetPid; const statusMap={'not started':'not-started','in progress':'in-progress','completed':'completed','blocked':'blocked','on hold':'on-hold','complete':'completed','done':'completed'}; const prioMap={'critical':'critical','high':'high','medium':'medium','low':'low','1':'high','2':'medium','3':'low'}; // Track phases seen to assign consistent phase IDs const phaseIndex={}; let phSeq=0; const getPhId=name=>{ if(!phaseIndex[name])phaseIndex[name]='PH'+String(++phSeq).padStart(2,'0'); return phaseIndex[name]; }; const subIndex={}; let spSeq=0; const getSpId=(phId,name)=>{ const k=phId+'|'+name; if(!subIndex[k])subIndex[k]=phId+'_SP'+String(++spSeq).padStart(2,'0'); return subIndex[k]; }; let seq=1; const tasks=IMP.taskRows.filter(r=>r[m.name]&&r[m.name].trim()).map(r=>{ const name=(r[m.name]||'').trim(); const phName = m.phase>=0 ? (r[m.phase]||'General').trim() : 'General'; const spName = m.subphase>=0 ? (r[m.subphase]||phName).trim() : phName; const phId = _slugify(phName) || getPhId(phName); const spId = _slugify(spName) || getSpId(phId,spName); const rawSt = (m.status>=0?r[m.status]:'').toLowerCase().trim(); const pct = m.progress>=0 ? _parsePct(r[m.progress]) : (rawSt.includes('%')?parseInt(rawSt):0); // If status column actually contains %, derive status from pct let status = statusMap[rawSt]||''; if(!status){ if(pct===100) status='completed'; else if(pct>0) status='in-progress'; else status='not-started'; } const start = m.start>=0?_parseMSDate(r[m.start]):''; const end = m.end>=0?_parseMSDate(r[m.end]):''; const dur = m.duration>=0?_parseDuration(r[m.duration]): (start&&end?Math.max(1,Math.round((new Date(end)-new Date(start))/86400000)):1); const rawPri=(m.priority>=0?r[m.priority]:'').toLowerCase().trim(); const priority=prioMap[rawPri]||'medium'; const blStart = m.baseline_start>=0?_parseMSDate(r[m.baseline_start]):''; const blEnd = m.baseline_end>=0?_parseMSDate(r[m.baseline_end]):''; return { id:`${pid}-T${String(seq++).padStart(4,'0')}`,projectId:pid, phaseId:phId,phaseName:phName,subphaseId:spId,subphaseName:spName, name,status,priority, assignee:m.assignee>=0?(r[m.assignee]||'').trim():'', startDate:start,endDate:end,duration:dur,progress:pct, cost:0,milestone:0,constraint:'asap',predecessors:[], notes:m.notes>=0?(r[m.notes]||'').trim():'', baselineStart:blStart||start,baselineEnd:blEnd||end, baselineSet:blStart?new Date().toISOString():'', }; }); if(!tasks.length){ toast('No valid tasks found in file','error'); return; } // Route import commit through TaskService for centralized validation/persistence. const importRs=TaskService.importTasks(pid,tasks); if(!importRs.ok){toast(importRs.error||'Import failed','error');return;} _refreshViews({sb:true}); const _projsNow=Store.getProjects(); if(S.proj&&S.proj.id===pid){ S.proj=_projsNow[pid]; renderDetStats(); renderWBS(); } toast(`${importRs.count} tasks imported into ${_projsNow[pid]?.name||pid}`,'success'); closeMod('importMod'); } function exportCSV(){ if(!S.proj)return; const ts=Store.getTasksByProject(S.proj.id); const rows=[['WBS ID','Task Name','Phase','Sub-Phase','Status','Priority','Assignee','Start','Finish','Duration','Progress%','Cost INR','Milestone','Constraint','Predecessors','Notes']]; ts.forEach(t=>rows.push([t.id,t.name,t.phaseName,t.subphaseName,t.status,t.priority,t.assignee||'',t.startDate||'',t.endDate||'',t.duration||'',t.progress||0,t.cost||0,t.milestone?'Yes':'No',t.constraint||'',(t.predecessors||[]).map(p=>p.id.split('-').pop()+':'+p.type).join('; '),(t.notes||'').replace(/,/g,';')])); const csv=rows.map(r=>r.map(c=>`"${String(c).replace(/"/g,'""')}"`).join(',')).join('\n'); const blob=new Blob([csv],{type:'text/csv'});const a=document.createElement('a');a.href=URL.createObjectURL(blob);a.download=S.proj.code+'-tasks.csv';a.click(); toast('CSV exported','success'); } function printReport(){window.print();} // Modal outside click document.querySelectorAll('.modal-ov').forEach(o=>o.addEventListener('click',e=>{if(e.target===o)o.classList.remove('open');})); // ============================================================ // BOOT // ============================================================ boot(); // ============================================================ // SITE PLAN // ============================================================ const HOTSPOTS=[ [13.25,26.6,6.5,4.8,'P001'], [12.25,33.1,6.5,4.8,'P002'], [11.25,39.6,6.5,4.8,'P003'], [9.25,46.6,6.5,4.8,'P004'], [8.25,54.6,6.5,4.8,'P005'], [7.25,61.1,6.5,4.8,'P006'], [6.25,68.1,6.5,4.8,'P007'], [4.75,76.6,6.5,4.8,'P008'], [3.25,84.1,6.5,4.8,'P009'], [2.25,89.1,6.5,4.8,'P010'], [21.25,25.6,6.5,4.8,'P011'], [20.25,31.6,6.5,4.8,'P012'], [19.25,38.1,6.5,4.8,'P013'], [18.25,45.1,6.5,4.8,'P014'], [18.75,71.6,6.5,4.8,'P015'], [17.25,77.1,6.5,4.8,'P016'], [16.25,84.6,6.5,4.8,'P017'], [15.25,90.6,6.5,4.8,'P018'], [13.75,25.6,6.5,4.8,'P019'], [13.75,71.1,6.5,4.8,'P020'], [26.75,27.1,6.5,4.8,'P021'], [26.25,33.1,6.5,4.8,'P022'], [25.25,40.1,6.5,4.8,'P023'], [24.25,47.1,6.5,4.8,'P024'], [29.75,52.1,6.5,4.8,'P025'], [30.75,59.6,6.5,4.8,'P026'], [28.75,64.1,6.5,4.8,'P027'], [34.25,28.6,6.5,4.8,'P028'], [33.75,34.6,6.5,4.8,'P029'], [34.75,42.1,6.5,4.8,'P030'], [35.75,48.6,6.5,4.8,'P031'], [33.25,59.6,6.5,4.8,'P032'], [42.75,64.6,6.5,4.8,'P033'], [40.75,55.1,6.5,4.8,'P034'], [41.75,61.1,6.5,4.8,'P035'], [40.25,72.1,6.5,4.8,'P036'], [32.25,72.1,6.5,4.8,'P037'], [47.25,72.1,6.5,4.8,'P038'], [58.75,49.1,6.5,4.8,'P039'], [59.25,55.1,6.5,4.8,'P040'], [67.25,48.6,6.5,4.8,'P041'], [67.25,54.1,6.5,4.8,'P042'], [64.75,62.6,6.5,4.8,'P043'], [75.75,48.1,6.5,4.8,'P044'], [75.75,53.6,6.5,4.8,'P045'], [73.75,64.1,6.5,4.8,'P046'], [83.25,48.1,6.5,4.8,'P047'], [83.25,53.6,6.5,4.8,'P048'], [83.25,59.6,6.5,4.8,'P049'], [83.25,65.1,6.5,4.8,'P050'], [88.25,48.6,6.5,4.8,'P051'], [88.25,60.6,6.5,4.8,'P052'], [88.25,66.6,6.5,4.8,'P053'], [69.75,73.6,6.5,4.8,'P054'], [76.75,73.6,6.5,4.8,'P055'], [83.75,73.6,6.5,4.8,'P056'], [88.75,73.6,6.5,4.8,'P057'], [82.5,14.5,5.0,4.0,'P058'], [82.5,19.5,5.0,4.0,'P059'], [87.0,19.0,5.0,4.0,'P060'], [1.25,81.6,6.5,4.8,'P061'], [11.25,83.6,6.5,4.8,'P062'], [10.25,89.1,6.5,4.8,'P063'], [15.75,84.1,6.5,4.8,'P064'], [41.25,62.6,6.5,4.8,'P065'], [49.25,73.1,6.5,4.8,'P066'], [64.25,73.1,6.5,4.8,'P067'], [67.75,73.1,6.5,4.8,'P068'], [61.25,53.6,6.5,4.8,'P069'], [69.25,53.6,6.5,4.8,'P070'], [71.75,62.6,6.5,4.8,'P071'], [86.75,54.6,6.5,4.8,'P072'], [33.25,28.6,6.5,4.8,'P073'], [25.75,63.1,6.5,4.8,'P074'], [19.75,52.6,6.5,4.8,'P075'], [27.25,54.6,6.5,4.8,'P076'], [23.25,70.6,6.5,4.8,'P077'], [25.25,71.6,6.5,4.8,'P078'], [29.75,72.1,6.5,4.8,'P079'], [50.75,73.1,6.5,4.8,'P080'], [54.25,73.1,6.5,4.8,'P081'], [58.25,64.1,6.5,4.8,'P082'], [72.75,73.1,6.5,4.8,'P083'], [80.75,74.1,6.5,4.8,'P084'], [45.25,73.1,6.5,4.8,'P085'], [38.75,62.6,6.5,4.8,'P086'], [34.75,63.6,6.5,4.8,'P087'], [22.75,42.6,6.5,4.8,'P088'], [31.75,52.6,6.5,4.8,'P089'], [33.75,62.6,6.5,4.8,'P090'], [36.75,55.6,6.5,4.8,'P091'], [63.75,53.6,6.5,4.8,'P092'], [65.25,73.6,6.5,4.8,'P093'] ]; let _popupProjId=null; function renderHotspots(){ const projs=Object.values(Store.getProjects()); const img=document.getElementById('sitePlanImg'); const wrap=document.getElementById('hotspotDivs'); if(!img||!wrap)return; const W=img.offsetWidth,H=img.offsetHeight; const statusClr={'on-track':'#3a6b47','at-risk':'#b87333','delayed':'#8b3a3a','completed':'#c9a84c','not-started':'#a09080'}; const showLabels=window._showHsLabels||false; wrap.innerHTML=HOTSPOTS.map((h,i)=>{ const [xp,yp,wp,hp,pid]=h; const p=Store.getProjects()[pid];if(!p)return''; const x=xp/100*W,y=yp/100*H,w=wp/100*W,ht=hp/100*H; const shortName=p.name.replace('Villa ',''); const statusClr={'on-track':'#3a6b47','at-risk':'#b87333','delayed':'#8b3a3a','completed':'#c9a84c','not-started':'#a09080'}; const clr=statusClr[p.status]||'#888'; return `
    ${showLabels?`${shortName}`:''}
    `; }).join(''); } function showVillaPopup(pid,e){ const projs=Store.getProjects(),tasksAll=Store.getAllTasks(); const p=projs[pid];if(!p)return; _popupProjId=pid; const ts=tasksAll[pid]||[]; const done=ts.filter(t=>t.status==='completed').length; const ip=ts.filter(t=>t.status==='in-progress').length; const bl=ts.filter(t=>t.status==='blocked').length; const pct=p.status==='completed'?100:_wPct(ts); const statusClr={'on-track':'#3a6b47','at-risk':'#b87333','delayed':'#8b3a3a','completed':'#c9a84c','not-started':'#9a8e78'}; const clr=statusClr[p.status]||'#888'; document.getElementById('popupContent').innerHTML=`
    ${p.name}
    ${p.code}
    ${slt(p.status)}
    Overall Progress ${pct}%
    ${ts.length}
    Tasks
    ${ip}
    Active
    ${bl}
    Blocked
    PM: ${p.pm||'-'} Budget: INR ${fmtK(p.budget)}
    `; const popup=document.getElementById('villaPopup'); popup.style.display='block'; // Position near click but keep on screen const vw=window.innerWidth,vh=window.innerHeight; let px=e.clientX+14,py=e.clientY-20; if(px+330>vw)px=e.clientX-340; if(py+360>vh)py=vh-370; popup.style.left=Math.max(10,px)+'px'; popup.style.top=Math.max(10,py)+'px'; } function closePopup(){ document.getElementById('villaPopup').style.display='none'; _popupProjId=null; } function openPopupProj(){ if(_popupProjId){const pid=_popupProjId;closePopup();openProj(pid);} } // Close popup on escape document.addEventListener('keydown',function(e){ if(e.key==='Escape')closePopup(); }); // Re-render hotspots on window resize window.addEventListener('resize',function(){ if(document.getElementById('view-plan')?.classList.contains('active'))renderHotspots(); }); function toggleSidebar(){ const sb=document.getElementById('sidebar'); const reopenBtn=document.getElementById('sbReopen'); sb.classList.toggle('collapsed'); const isCollapsed=sb.classList.contains('collapsed'); if(reopenBtn)reopenBtn.style.display=isCollapsed?'flex':'none'; setTimeout(()=>{ if(S.proj&&S.tab==='tg')renderGantt(); },220); } // ============================================================ // AUTH & PROJECT SELECTION // ============================================================ // USERS[] removed - authentication is handled server-side via /api/auth/login. // Credentials are never stored in client code. let _currentUser = null; let _currentDev = null; let _origDevFilter = null; // ── Permission flags (set after login) ─────────────────────────────────────── window.CAN = { edit: false, approve: false, manage: false }; function _initPermissions(user){ const p=(user.permissions||'view').split(','); window.CAN.edit = p.includes('edit'); window.CAN.approve = p.includes('approve'); window.CAN.manage = p.includes('manage'); } function _applyPermissions(){ // Header buttons const manageBtn=document.querySelector('#app-header button[onclick="openDevMgmt()"]'); const importBtn=document.querySelector('#app-header button[onclick="importAll()"]'); const addVillaBtn=document.querySelector('#app-header button[onclick="openAddProj()"]'); if(manageBtn)manageBtn.style.display=CAN.manage?'':'none'; if(importBtn)importBtn.style.display=CAN.manage?'':'none'; if(addVillaBtn)addVillaBtn.style.display=CAN.manage?'':'none'; // Approvals button const apvBtn=$('approvalsBtn'); if(apvBtn)apvBtn.style.display=CAN.approve?'':'none'; // Select screen Add Development button const addDevBtn=document.querySelector('button[onclick="devMgmtAddDev()"]'); if(addDevBtn)addDevBtn.style.display=CAN.manage?'':'none'; // Audit log button (manage only) const auditBtn=$('auditLogBtn'); if(auditBtn)auditBtn.style.display=CAN.manage?'':'none'; // Task side-panel action buttons (Edit, Copy, Status, Delete) const tpacts=document.querySelector('.tpacts'); if(tpacts)tpacts.style.display=CAN.edit?'':'none'; // View-only banner removed } async function doLogin(){ const email = $('li-email').value.trim().toLowerCase(); const pass = $('li-pass').value; const err = $('li-err'); const loginBtn = document.querySelector('#screen-login button'); err.style.display='none'; if(!email||!pass){ err.textContent='Please enter email and password.'; err.style.display='block'; return; } if(loginBtn) loginBtn.disabled = true; // ── File mode: client-side authentication ────────────────────────────────── // Works when the HTML is opened directly (file://) without a backend server. if(!CKY_API){ // User roster - edit passwords here if you change them const _LOCAL_USERS=[ {id:'u1', email:'admin@chanakya.in', name:'Admin', role:'Administrator', permissions:'edit,approve,manage', ph:'Q2hhbmdlTWUwMDEh'}, {id:'u2', email:'pavan@whitelotusgroup.in', name:'Pavan', role:'Project Manager',permissions:'approve', ph:'Q2hhbmdlTWUwMDIh'}, {id:'u3', email:'chetan@whitelotusgroup.in', name:'Chetan', role:'Project Manager',permissions:'approve', ph:'Q2hhbmdlTWUwMDMh'}, {id:'u4', email:'praveer.c@whitelotusgroup.in', name:'Praveer C', role:'Project Manager',permissions:'edit,manage', ph:'Q2hhbmdlTWUwMDQh'}, {id:'u5', email:'shraddha.b@whitelotusgroup.in', name:'Shraddha B', role:'Project Manager',permissions:'edit,manage', ph:'Q2hhbmdlTWUwMDUh'}, {id:'u6', email:'stanly.john@whitelotusgroup.in', name:'Stanly John', role:'Project Manager',permissions:'view', ph:'Q2hhbmdlTWUwMDYh'}, {id:'u7', email:'vandana.p@whitelotusgroup.in', name:'Vandana P', role:'Project Manager',permissions:'edit,approve,manage', ph:'Q2hhbmdlTWUwMDch'}, {id:'u8', email:'productanalyst.wl@gmail.com', name:'Product Analyst', role:'Analyst', permissions:'view', ph:'Q2hhbmdlTWUwMDgh'}, {id:'u9', email:'dinesh@whitelotusgroup.in', name:'Dinesh', role:'Project Manager',permissions:'edit,manage', ph:'d2xnMTIz'}, {id:'u10',email:'madhavarajan.s@whitelotusgroup.in',name:'Madhavarajan S', role:'Project Manager',permissions:'manage', ph:'d2xnMTIz'}, ]; const u=_LOCAL_USERS.find(x=>x.email===email); const passOk = u && (btoa(pass)===u.ph); if(!u||!passOk){ err.textContent='Incorrect email or password.'; err.style.display='block'; $('li-pass').value=''; $('li-pass').style.borderColor='rgba(220,80,80,.6)'; setTimeout(()=>$('li-pass').style.borderColor='rgba(255,255,255,.15)',1500); if(loginBtn) loginBtn.disabled=false; return; } _setToken('local-'+u.id+'-'+Date.now()); _currentUser={id:u.id,email:u.email,name:u.name,role:u.role,permissions:u.permissions||'view'}; _initPermissions(_currentUser); $('screen-login').style.opacity='0'; $('screen-login').style.transition='opacity .3s'; setTimeout(()=>{ $('screen-login').style.display='none'; showSelectScreen(); _applyPermissions(); },300); if(loginBtn) loginBtn.disabled=false; return; } // ── Server mode: backend authentication ──────────────────────────────────── try{ const res = await fetch(CKY_API+'/api/auth/login',{ method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:JSON.stringify({email, password:pass}) }); const data = await res.json(); if(!res.ok){ err.textContent = data.error || 'Incorrect email or password.'; err.style.display='block'; $('li-pass').value=''; $('li-pass').style.borderColor='rgba(220,80,80,.6)'; setTimeout(()=>$('li-pass').style.borderColor='rgba(255,255,255,.15)',1500); return; } _setToken(data.token); _currentUser = data.user; _initPermissions(_currentUser); $('screen-login').style.opacity='0'; $('screen-login').style.transition='opacity .3s'; setTimeout(()=>{ $('screen-login').style.display='none'; showSelectScreen(); _applyPermissions(); },300); }catch(e){ console.error('[CKY] doLogin error:', e); err.textContent = 'Cannot connect to server - is the backend running? ('+e.message+')'; err.style.display='block'; }finally{ if(loginBtn) loginBtn.disabled = false; } } // ── Google Sign-In helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── // ── Google Sign-In - OAuth2 Token Client (popup, no iframe redirects) ───────── // Uses google.accounts.oauth2 instead of google.accounts.id to avoid the // blank gsi/transform page that the renderButton iframe approach produces. let _googleOAuth2Client = null; // Google Client ID - injected at runtime via /config.js (set GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID in .env to enable) const _G_CLIENT_ID = (window.CKY_CONFIG && window.CKY_CONFIG.googleClientId) || ''; function initGoogleSignIn(){ if(!_G_CLIENT_ID) return; // Google login not configured - skip if(!window.google || !window.google.accounts || !window.google.accounts.oauth2) return; if(!CKY_API) return; // file:// mode - skip try{ _googleOAuth2Client = google.accounts.oauth2.initTokenClient({ client_id: _G_CLIENT_ID, scope: 'email profile openid', callback: _handleGoogleToken, error_callback: function(err){ // 'popup_closed' just means the user dismissed - don't show an error for that if(err.type==='popup_closed'||err.type==='popup_failed_to_open') return; const gerr=$('li-g-err'); if(gerr){ gerr.textContent='Google sign-in error: '+(err.message||err.type||'unknown'); gerr.style.display='block'; } }, }); // Render a custom styled button (matches the dark login card theme) const wrap=document.getElementById('googleLoginBtn'); if(wrap && !wrap.querySelector('button')){ wrap.innerHTML=``; } }catch(e){ console.warn('[CKY] Google Sign-In init failed:', e.message); } } function googleSignInClick(){ if(!_googleOAuth2Client){ console.warn('[CKY] Google OAuth2 client not ready'); return; } const gerr=$('li-g-err'); if(gerr) gerr.style.display='none'; // prompt:'select_account' always shows the account picker _googleOAuth2Client.requestAccessToken({prompt:'select_account'}); } async function _handleGoogleToken(tokenResponse){ const gerr=$('li-g-err'); if(gerr) gerr.style.display='none'; if(tokenResponse.error){ if(gerr){ gerr.textContent='Google sign-in cancelled or failed. Please try again.'; gerr.style.display='block'; } return; } try{ const res=await fetch(CKY_API+'/api/auth/google',{ method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:JSON.stringify({access_token:tokenResponse.access_token}) }); const data=await res.json(); if(!res.ok){ if(gerr){ gerr.textContent=data.error||'Google sign-in failed.'; gerr.style.display='block'; } return; } _setToken(data.token); _currentUser=data.user; _initPermissions(_currentUser); $('screen-login').style.opacity='0'; $('screen-login').style.transition='opacity .3s'; setTimeout(()=>{ $('screen-login').style.display='none'; showSelectScreen(); _applyPermissions(); },300); }catch(e){ console.error('[CKY] _handleGoogleToken error:',e); if(gerr){ gerr.textContent='Cannot connect to server - is the backend running?'; gerr.style.display='block'; } } } function showSelectScreen(){ if(!_currentUser)return; $('sel-user').textContent='Signed in as '+_currentUser.name; const projs=Object.values(Store.getProjects()), tasksAll=Store.getAllTasks(); // Update Amanvana / Kandhavara stat tiles ['Amanvana','Kandhavara'].forEach(dev=>{ const dvP=projs.filter(p=>(p.dev||'Amanvana')===dev); const dvVillas=dvP.filter(p=>!['landscape','waterbody','development','phase-summary'].includes(p.type)); const dvT=dvP.flatMap(p=>tasksAll[p.id]||[]); const pct=_wPct(dvT); const onTrack=dvVillas.filter(p=>p.status==='on-track').length; const atRisk=dvVillas.filter(p=>['at-risk','delayed'].includes(p.status)).length; const px=dev==='Amanvana'?'am':'kd'; const ue=$('sel-'+px+'-units'),pe=$('sel-'+px+'-pct'),oe=$('sel-'+px+'-ontrack'),re=$('sel-'+px+'-atrisk'); if(ue)ue.textContent=dev==='Amanvana'?95:dvVillas.length; if(pe)pe.textContent=pct+'%';if(oe)oe.textContent=onTrack;if(re)re.textContent=atRisk; }); // Render user-created development cards _renderExtraDevCards(projs, tasksAll); const sel=$('screen-select'); sel.style.opacity='0'; sel.style.display='flex'; requestAnimationFrame(()=>{ sel.style.transition='opacity .35s'; sel.style.opacity='1'; }); } function _renderExtraDevCards(projs, tasksAll){ const wrap=$('sel-extra-devs'); if(!wrap) return; const fixed=new Set(['Amanvana','Kandhavara']); const extraDevs=[...new Set(projs.map(p=>p.dev).filter(d=>d&&!fixed.has(d)))]; if(!extraDevs.length){ wrap.style.display='none'; return; } wrap.style.display='flex'; wrap.innerHTML=extraDevs.map(dev=>{ const dvP=projs.filter(p=>(p.dev||'')===dev); const dvVillas=dvP.filter(p=>!['landscape','waterbody','development','phase-summary'].includes(p.type)); const dvT=dvP.flatMap(p=>(tasksAll[p.id]||[])); const pct=_wPct(dvT); const isEmpty=dvVillas.length===0; return `
    ${dev}
    ${isEmpty ?`
    No villas yet
    Use Import or Add Villa to get started
    ` :`
    ${dvVillas.length} unit${dvVillas.length!==1?'s':''} · ${pct}% progress
    `}
    Open →
    `; }).join(''); } function selectDev(dev){ _currentDev=dev; $('screen-select').style.opacity='0'; setTimeout(()=>{ $('screen-select').style.display='none'; $('app-header').style.display=''; $('app-body').style.display=''; // Add dev indicator badge next to logo const existing=$('dev-badge');if(existing)existing.remove(); if(dev!=='ALL'){ const badge=document.createElement('span'); badge.id='dev-badge'; badge.style.cssText='font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;padding:4px 12px;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;transition:.15s'; badge.title='Click to switch development'; badge.textContent=dev; badge.onmouseover=()=>badge.style.background='var(--surface3)'; badge.onmouseout=()=>badge.style.background='var(--surface2)'; badge.onclick=switchDev; const logoWrap=document.querySelector('#app-header>div'); if(logoWrap)logoWrap.appendChild(badge); } _origDevFilter=dev==='ALL'?null:dev; boot(); },300); } function switchDev(){ $('app-header').style.display='none'; $('app-body').style.display='none'; const b=$('dev-badge');if(b)b.remove(); _origDevFilter=null; S._dev=null; showSelectScreen(); } function doLogout(){ _clearToken(); _currentUser=null; _currentDev=null; _origDevFilter=null; window.CAN.edit=false; window.CAN.approve=false; window.CAN.manage=false; $('screen-select').style.display='none'; $('app-header').style.display='none'; $('app-body').style.display='none'; $('li-email').value=''; $('li-pass').value=''; $('li-err').style.display='none'; const b=$('dev-badge');if(b)b.remove(); const login=$('screen-login'); login.style.opacity='0'; login.style.display='flex'; requestAnimationFrame(()=>{ login.style.transition='opacity .3s'; login.style.opacity='1'; }); } // ============================================================ // DEVELOPER SELF-TEST SUITE (Phase 5) // Run from browser console: _selfTest() // Returns a results object; logs pass/fail to console. // Safe: operates on isolated in-memory data, never writes to // localStorage or modifies live project state. // ============================================================ function _selfTest(){ const results={passed:0,failed:0,errors:[]}; function assert(label,condition,detail){ if(condition){results.passed++;console.log(` ✓ ${label}`);} else{results.failed++;const msg=` ✗ ${label}${detail?' - '+detail:''}`;console.error(msg);results.errors.push(msg);} } console.group('Chanakya PM - Self-Test Suite'); // ── BLOCK 1: Date Utilities console.group('1. Date Utilities (dBetween, addDays)'); assert('dBetween same day = 0', dBetween('2025-01-01','2025-01-01')===0); assert('dBetween 7 days forward', dBetween('2025-01-01','2025-01-08')===7); assert('dBetween crosses month', dBetween('2025-01-28','2025-02-04')===7); assert('dBetween crosses year', dBetween('2024-12-25','2025-01-01')===7); assert('addDays +7 produces correct date', addDays('2025-01-01',7)==='2025-01-08'); assert('addDays round-trips with dBetween', addDays('2025-03-15', dBetween('2025-03-15','2025-04-01'))==='2025-04-01'); assert('addDays +0 = identity', addDays('2025-06-15',0)==='2025-06-15'); console.groupEnd(); // ── BLOCK 2: Planner Date Helpers (_pAdd, _pDiff) console.group('2. Planner Date Helpers (_pAdd, _pDiff)'); assert('_pAdd +7 matches addDays', _pAdd('2025-01-01',7)==='2025-01-08'); assert('_pDiff matches dBetween', _pDiff('2025-01-01','2025-01-08')===7); assert('_pMax returns later date', _pMax('2025-01-01','2025-06-01')==='2025-06-01'); assert('_pMin returns earlier date',_pMin('2025-01-01','2025-06-01')==='2025-01-01'); assert('_pMax with null returns non-null', _pMax(null,'2025-06-01')==='2025-06-01'); console.groupEnd(); // ── BLOCK 3: Scheduling - _pForward console.group('3. Scheduling - _pForward (3-task chain)'); // Task B depends on Task A (FS), Task C depends on Task B (FS) const schedTasks=[ {id:'A',name:'A',start:'2025-01-01',end:'2025-01-05',duration:5,predecessors:[],isSummary:false,isCritical:false,float:null}, {id:'B',name:'B',start:'2025-01-06',end:'2025-01-10',duration:5,predecessors:[{id:'A',type:'FS',lag:0}],isSummary:false,isCritical:false,float:null}, {id:'C',name:'C',start:'2025-01-11',end:'2025-01-15',duration:5,predecessors:[{id:'B',type:'FS',lag:0}],isSummary:false,isCritical:false,float:null}, ]; // Shift A to end later - B and C should cascade forward schedTasks[0].end='2025-01-10'; schedTasks[0].duration=10; _pForward(schedTasks); assert('B starts day after A ends', schedTasks[1].start==='2025-01-11', `got ${schedTasks[1].start}`); assert('B ends 5 days after start', schedTasks[1].end ==='2025-01-15', `got ${schedTasks[1].end}`); assert('C starts day after B ends', schedTasks[2].start==='2025-01-16', `got ${schedTasks[2].start}`); assert('C ends 5 days after start', schedTasks[2].end ==='2025-01-20', `got ${schedTasks[2].end}`); console.groupEnd(); // ── BLOCK 4: Critical Path - Scheduler.criticalTaskIds console.group('4. Critical Path - Scheduler.criticalTaskIds'); // Chain A→B→C: all tasks on critical path (float=0) const cpChain=[ {id:'cp-A',name:'A',startDate:'2025-01-01',endDate:'2025-01-05',duration:5,predecessors:[],isSummary:false}, {id:'cp-B',name:'B',startDate:'2025-01-06',endDate:'2025-01-10',duration:5,predecessors:[{id:'cp-A',type:'FS',lag:0}],isSummary:false}, {id:'cp-C',name:'C',startDate:'2025-01-11',endDate:'2025-01-15',duration:5,predecessors:[{id:'cp-B',type:'FS',lag:0}],isSummary:false}, ]; const cpIds=Scheduler.criticalTaskIds(cpChain); assert('Chain A is critical', cpIds.has('cp-A'), `critical set: ${[...cpIds].join(',')}`); assert('Chain B is critical', cpIds.has('cp-B')); assert('Chain C is critical', cpIds.has('cp-C')); // Parallel paths: long path A→B (10 days total), short path C (3 days, no preds) const cpPar=[ {id:'pp-A',name:'A',startDate:'2025-01-01',endDate:'2025-01-05',duration:5,predecessors:[],isSummary:false}, {id:'pp-B',name:'B',startDate:'2025-01-06',endDate:'2025-01-10',duration:5,predecessors:[{id:'pp-A',type:'FS',lag:0}],isSummary:false}, {id:'pp-C',name:'C',startDate:'2025-01-01',endDate:'2025-01-03',duration:3,predecessors:[],isSummary:false}, ]; const cpParIds=Scheduler.criticalTaskIds(cpPar); assert('Parallel: long path A is critical', cpParIds.has('pp-A')); assert('Parallel: long path B is critical', cpParIds.has('pp-B')); assert('Parallel: short path C is NOT critical', !cpParIds.has('pp-C'), `C incorrectly in critical set`); console.groupEnd(); // ── BLOCK 4b: Task Sheet cascade - Scheduler.cascadeTaskSheet console.group('4b.
