Task Sheet cascade - Scheduler.cascadeTaskSheet'); const _scPid='__selftest_sched__'; const _scSeed=[ {id:'sc-A',projectId:_scPid,name:'A',status:'not-started',progress:0,startDate:'2025-01-01',endDate:'2025-01-05',duration:4,predecessors:[]}, {id:'sc-B',projectId:_scPid,name:'B',status:'not-started',progress:0,startDate:'2025-01-06',endDate:'2025-01-08',duration:2,predecessors:[{id:'sc-A',type:'FS',lag:0}]}, ]; Store.saveProjectTasks(_scPid,_scSeed); const _scEdited=Store.getTasksByProject(_scPid).map(t=>t.id==='sc-A'?{...t,endDate:'2025-01-10',duration:9}:t); Store.saveProjectTasks(_scPid,_scEdited); const _scChanged=Scheduler.cascadeTaskSheet(_scPid); const _scAfter=Store.getTasksByProject(_scPid); const _scB=_scAfter.find(t=>t.id==='sc-B'); assert('Cascade reports changed=true', _scChanged===true, `got ${_scChanged}`); assert('Cascade moves successor start to day after pred end', _scB&&_scB.startDate==='2025-01-11', `got ${_scB&&_scB.startDate}`); assert('Cascade preserves successor duration', _scB&&_scB.duration===2, `got ${_scB&&_scB.duration}`); const _scNoop=Scheduler.cascadeTaskSheet(_scPid); assert('Cascade no-op reports changed=false', _scNoop===false, `got ${_scNoop}`); Store.saveProjectTasks(_scPid,[]); console.groupEnd(); // ── BLOCK 4c: Planner/cache helper contracts console.group('4c. Planner/cache helper contracts'); const _phPid='__selftest_planner_helpers__'; delete _PT[_phPid]; assert('_pHas false before init', _pHas(_phPid)===false); const _phInit=_pData(_phPid); assert('_pData initializes array', Array.isArray(_phInit)&&_phInit.length===0); assert('_pHas true after init', _pHas(_phPid)===true); _pReplace(_phPid,[{id:'ph-1'},{id:'ph-2'}]); assert('_pReplace updates planner state', _pData(_phPid).length===2, `got ${_pData(_phPid).length}`); const _shStored=[{id:'A',progress:10},{id:'B',progress:20}]; const _shFresh=[{id:'A',progress:0},{id:'B',progress:0},{id:'C',progress:0}]; assert('_shouldReplaceFreshWithStoredTasks false for truncated cache', !_shouldReplaceFreshWithStoredTasks(_shStored,_shFresh)); const _mh=_mergeStoredTaskEditsIntoFresh([{id:'A',progress:55,status:'in-progress'}],[{id:'A',progress:0,status:'not-started'},{id:'B',progress:0,status:'not-started'}]); assert('_mergeStoredTaskEditsIntoFresh applies stored edits', _mh[0].progress===55 && _mh[0].status==='in-progress'); assert('_mergeStoredTaskEditsIntoFresh preserves unmatched fresh tasks', _mh[1].id==='B'); delete _PT[_phPid]; console.groupEnd(); // ── BLOCK 5: Task Data Validation console.group('5. _validateTaskData'); assert('Valid task passes', _validateTaskData({id:'T1',name:'Dig foundation',startDate:'2025-01-01',endDate:'2025-01-10',duration:10,progress:0,status:'not-started',predecessors:[]}).ok); assert('Missing name fails', !_validateTaskData({id:'T1',name:'',progress:0}).ok); assert('End before start fails', !_validateTaskData({id:'T1',name:'X',startDate:'2025-01-10',endDate:'2025-01-01',progress:0}).ok); assert('Progress > 100 fails', !_validateTaskData({id:'T1',name:'X',progress:150}).ok); assert('Self-referencing predecessor fails', !_validateTaskData({id:'T1',name:'X',progress:0,predecessors:[{id:'T1',type:'FS',lag:0}]}).ok); assert('Completed at 50% fails', !_validateTaskData({id:'T1',name:'X',progress:50,status:'completed'}).ok); console.groupEnd(); // ── BLOCK 6: Progress/Status + Actual Date Helpers console.group('6. normalize/stamp/recompute helpers'); const h1={id:'H1',name:'Helper Task',progress:20,status:'not-started',startDate:'2025-01-01',endDate:'2025-01-05',actualStartDate:'',actualEndDate:'',duration:1,predecessors:[]}; normalizeProgressStatus(h1); assert('normalize: 20% => in-progress', h1.status==='in-progress', `got ${h1.status}`); stampActualDates(h1,null,'2025-01-10'); assert('stamp: first non-zero sets actualStartDate', h1.actualStartDate==='2025-01-10', `got ${h1.actualStartDate}`); h1.progress=100; normalizeProgressStatus(h1); stampActualDates(h1,null,'2025-01-12'); assert('stamp: 100% sets actualEndDate', h1.actualEndDate==='2025-01-12', `got ${h1.actualEndDate}`); h1.progress=60; normalizeProgressStatus(h1); stampActualDates(h1,null,'2025-01-13'); assert('stamp: dropping below 100 clears actualEndDate', h1.actualEndDate===''); const h2={id:'H2',name:'Dur Task',progress:0,status:'not-started',startDate:'2025-02-01',endDate:'2025-02-10',duration:1,predecessors:[]}; recomputeDuration(h2); assert('recomputeDuration uses planned dates', h2.duration===9, `got ${h2.duration}`); console.groupEnd(); // ── BLOCK 7: Dependency cycle detection console.group('7. _hasDependencyCycle'); const acyclic=[ {id:'A',predecessors:[]}, {id:'B',predecessors:[{id:'A'}]}, {id:'C',predecessors:[{id:'B'}]}, ]; const cyclic=[ {id:'A',predecessors:[{id:'C'}]}, {id:'B',predecessors:[{id:'A'}]}, {id:'C',predecessors:[{id:'B'}]}, ]; assert('Acyclic graph returns false', !_hasDependencyCycle(acyclic)); assert('Cyclic graph returns true', _hasDependencyCycle(cyclic)); console.groupEnd(); // ── BLOCK 8: DB round-trip console.group('8. DB.sTasks / DB.tasks round-trip'); const _testPid='__selftest__'; const _testTasks=[{id:'st-T1',name:'Test Task',projectId:_testPid,startDate:'2025-01-01',endDate:'2025-01-05',duration:5,progress:0,status:'not-started',predecessors:[]}]; Store.saveProjectTasks(_testPid,_testTasks); const _rtTasks=Store.getTasksByProject(_testPid); assert('Round-trip: task count correct', _rtTasks.length===1, `got ${_rtTasks.length}`); assert('Round-trip: task name preserved', _rtTasks[0]&&_rtTasks[0].name==='Test Task'); assert('Round-trip: task id preserved', _rtTasks[0]&&_rtTasks[0].id==='st-T1'); // Clean up test data Store.saveProjectTasks(_testPid,[]); console.groupEnd(); // ── BLOCK 9: TaskService result-shape smoke tests console.group('9. TaskService result-shape smoke'); const _tsPid='__selftest_ts__'; const _tsSeed=[ {id:'ts-A',projectId:_tsPid,name:'A',phaseId:'foundation',phaseName:'Foundation Works',subphaseId:'site-prep',subphaseName:'Site Preparation',status:'not-started',priority:'medium',assignee:'',progress:0,startDate:'2025-01-01',endDate:'2025-01-05',duration:4,cost:0,milestone:0,constraint:'asap',predecessors:[],notes:''}, {id:'ts-B',projectId:_tsPid,name:'B',phaseId:'foundation',phaseName:'Foundation Works',subphaseId:'site-prep',subphaseName:'Site Preparation',status:'not-started',priority:'medium',assignee:'',progress:0,startDate:'2025-01-06',endDate:'2025-01-10',duration:4,cost:0,milestone:0,constraint:'asap',predecessors:[],notes:''}, ]; Store.saveProjectTasks(_tsPid,_tsSeed); const hasShape=rs=>!!rs&&typeof rs==='object'&&('ok'in rs)&&((rs.ok===true)||typeof rs.error==='string'); const hasCode=rs=>!!rs&&typeof rs==='object'&&('code'in rs||rs.ok===true); const rs1=TaskService.updateTask(_tsPid,'ts-A',{progress:50}); assert('TaskService.updateTask shape', hasShape(rs1), JSON.stringify(rs1)); assert('TaskService.updateTask ok true', rs1.ok===true, JSON.stringify(rs1)); const rs2=TaskService.moveTaskByStep(_tsPid,'ts-A',1); assert('TaskService.moveTaskByStep shape', hasShape(rs2), JSON.stringify(rs2)); const rs3=TaskService.duplicateTask(_tsPid,'ts-A'); assert('TaskService.duplicateTask shape', hasShape(rs3), JSON.stringify(rs3)); const rs4=TaskService.importTasks('',[]); assert('TaskService.importTasks invalid payload shape', hasShape(rs4)&&rs4.ok===false, JSON.stringify(rs4)); assert('TaskService.importTasks invalid payload code', hasCode(rs4)&&rs4.code===TaskService.ERR.INVALID_PAYLOAD, JSON.stringify(rs4)); const rs5=TaskService.cycleTaskStatus(_tsPid,'missing-task'); assert('TaskService.cycleTaskStatus failure shape', hasShape(rs5)&&rs5.ok===false, JSON.stringify(rs5)); assert('TaskService.cycleTaskStatus failure code', hasCode(rs5)&&rs5.code===TaskService.ERR.TASK_NOT_FOUND, JSON.stringify(rs5)); Store.saveProjectTasks(_tsPid,[]); delete _PT[_tsPid]; console.groupEnd(); // ── Summary const total=results.passed+results.failed; console.groupEnd(); // close main group const summary=`Self-test complete: ${results.passed}/${total} passed${results.failed>0?' - '+results.failed+' FAILED':''}`; if(results.failed>0){console.error(summary);results.errors.forEach(e=>console.error(e));} else{console.log('%c'+summary,'color:green;font-weight:bold');} return results; } // Expose to window so devs can call _selfTest() from browser console window._selfTest=_selfTest; window._validateTaskData=_validateTaskData; // Google GIS may load after our script - poll until ready then initialise. // Only runs if a Google Client ID has been configured (GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID in .env). (function _waitForGIS(){ if(!_G_CLIENT_ID) return; // Google login not configured - skip if(window.google && window.google.accounts && window.google.accounts.oauth2){ initGoogleSignIn(); } else { setTimeout(_waitForGIS, 200); } })();
    Import Data
    Export from Google Sheets, then upload here:
    In Google Sheets → File → Download → Microsoft Excel (.xlsx) or Comma Separated Values (.csv)
    Then drop the file below. Both .xlsx and .csv files are accepted. For Excel files with multiple sheets, select the correct sheet after upload.
    Step 1 — Get the template
    Download the Chanakya task template, fill it in with your task data, then upload it below.
    Required columns: Task Name · Phase · Sub-Phase · Start Date · Finish Date · Duration · Progress % · Status · Priority · Assignee
    📊
    Drop file here or click to browse
    Accepts .xlsx, .xls, and .csv files exported from Google Sheets or Excel
    White Lotus IVC - Master Schedule Import
    Upload the Master Schedule - 34 Villas CSV file. The tool will automatically parse all 34 villas, extract construction phases and task dates, and create one project per villa with a full task list.
    📋
    Drop Master Schedule CSV here or click to browse
    Export from Google Sheets → File → Download → CSV
    Step 2 - Dependency Mapping (optional - adds WBS codes, predecessors & constraint notes)
    🔗
    Drop Dependency Mapping CSV here or click to browse
    Dependency Mapping - MSP - Sheet1.csv
    How to export from MS Project:
    File → Save As → CSV (Comma Separated Values) or File → Export → Excel Workbook → Save as CSV.
    Your CSV needs at minimum: Code / ID and Name columns. Optional: Status, Phase, Start, Finish, Budget, PM.
    Date format: DD/MM/YYYY or YYYY-MM-DD. Status values: not-started, in-progress, on-track, at-risk, delayed, completed.
    Drop CSV here or click to browse
    Accepts .csv files exported from MS Project or Excel
    Canonical Task Import Format:
    Use the downloadable template and keep the same column names.
    Required columns: Task Name, Phase, Sub-Phase, Start Date, Finish Date, Duration, Progress %, Status, Priority, Assignee, Notes, Baseline Start, Baseline Finish.
    Drop CSV here or click to browse
    MS Project CSV export - one file per villa
    Restore from a Chanakya backup:
    Select a .json file previously exported via the Export button.
    The backup file contains: projects (villa metadata), tasks (all task data), and resources.
    Importing will merge project and resource records and restore all tasks for matching project IDs.
    Drop JSON backup here or click to browse
    Accepts .json files exported from Chanakya
    Approval Requests
    All pending requests

    Loading Chanakya…
